unixorn/awesome-zsh-plugins

Development Environment  2 days ago  11.7k
A collection of ZSH frameworks, plugins, themes and tutorials.
View byDAY/WEEK/README
View on Github

Oct 12th

Completions

  • ssh (sunlei)stars23 - Better host completion for ssh.
  • ssh (zpm-zsh)stars17 - Add host completion for ssh.
  • lets-clistars2 - Add autocompletion for letsstars58 cli task runner.

    • Oct 11th

    Themes

  • bubblified (varaki)stars0 - Based on bubblified (hohmannr)stars58. Changes color when root. Includes decorators to show user@host and current directory.
  • gitbashstars0 - Mimics the default prompt from Git for Windows. Includes git status, user@host and current directory decorators.

    • Oct 10th

    Plugins

  • senvstars0 - Report presence of sensitive environment variables in the prompt

    • Oct 9th

    Plugins

  • znvmstars0 - A nodejs version manager for ZSH similar to nvm.shstars61.6k but faster.

    • Oct 7th

    Completions

  • condastars267 - ZSH tab completion for conda.

    • Themes

  • purplebloodstars0 - Based on darkblood. Includes decorators for username@host, git status, and current directory.

    • Oct 6th

    Plugins

  • git-prompt-enhancedstars0 - Provides a more granular information about a git repository.

    • Themes

  • dangerroomstars0 - Informative, minimal, and, above all, X-Men themed. Includes decorators for git status, working directory, parent directory and vim mode.

    • Oct 5th

    Completions

  • ddcstars19 - Adds tab completions for ddcstars485.

    • Themes

  • nt9stars29 - A clean, distraction free and git focused development theme. Shows path relative to git root (or ~ when outside git repo), time since last commit, current SHA, branch and branch state.

    • Oct 4th

    Completions

  • symfony-completestars0 - Universal completion for Symfony based CLI applications: composer, php-cs-fix, bin/console, artisan, php-cs-fixer and etc. This supports autocompletion for subcommands and GNU-style options (--help)

    • Oct 3rd

    Themes

  • themerafstars0 - Has decorators for username, last two directories in working directory path, git status, timestamp, last exit status and also name of active virtual environment.
  • ParoaPestars0 - Based on lpha3chostars31
  • lpha3chostars31 - Modified version of the intheloop theme for pentesters which includes the date, time, and IP address for pentest logging.

    • Oct 2nd

    Plugins

  • fd-pluginstars0 - Adds aliases for fdstars24.9k, a modern replacement for find.

    • Oct 1st

    Plugins

  • communismstars1 - Displays a Marx quote of the day.

    • Sep 30th

    Themes

  • searocketstars0 - Slimmed down version of spaceshipstars17.5k. Includes decorators for working directory, last command exit code, user, background jobs, bun, d, elm, go, nodejs, python, zig and git status.

    • Completions

  • wsl-notifystars0 - Uses wsl-notify-sendstars54 to notify when a command takes longer than 15 seconds. Windows-only.

    • Sep 29th

    Plugins

  • git-aliases (peterhurford)stars73 - Creates a lot of useful aliases for combinations of commonly used git commands.
  • git-aliases (remino)stars0 - Aliases all git xyz commands to gxyz. Also aliases g to git.
  • mysql-loginstars0 - Adds alias for MySQL with login path.

    • Sep 28th

    Tutorials

    Oh-My-Zsh

  • How to Install and Configure Z Shell in Ubuntustars0 - Amar Pan's article will walk you through the process of installing and configuring ZSH, including how to change themes and enable the time-saving autosuggestions plug-in.

    • Themes

  • windowsstars31 - Inspired by the Windows Command Prompt. Includes a decorator for the current directory.

    • Sep 27th

    Plugins

  • spaceship-ocmstars0 - Queries your OpenShift Cluster Manager (ocm) configuration to show which environment you're connected to. Requires NerdFont in your terminal.

    • Sep 25th

    Plugins

  • whobrokemycodestars0 - Highlight where a particular line was last changed in a file using git blame.
  • znotifystars0 - A simple plugin for sending notifications to other services.
  • zredisstars1 - Adds Redis database support, with database_key <-> shell_variable binding. Supports all data types.
  • zshmuxstars8 - When a new shell is launched, quickly checks if there are any tmux sessions, or if the current shell is already in a tmux instance. If you are not already in a tmux session it will list all currently active sessions, and ask if you want to attach a currently running session, or make a new session in the shell.

    • Completions

  • cabal (ehamberg)stars1 - Add tab completion for cabal.

    • Themes

  • mzptstars2 - Minimal prompt inspired by powerlevel10kstars31.7k.

    • Sep 23rd

    Themes

  • carriage-returnstars0 - omz's robbyrussell with an added carriage return.

    • Sep 22nd

    Themes

  • alpstars0 - A simple theme with decorations for current directory, root status, username and host.

    • Sep 21st

    Setups

    zinit

  • 12.9k+ tab completions
  • 400+ zpwr subcommands
  • 2.8k functions
  • 175+ zpwr environment variables
  • 175+ perl, python, bash, zsh scripts
  • 50k+ LOC

    • Sep 20th

    Plugins

  • gitgostars10 - Open a Github/Gitlab repository in your browser from the command line (macOS only).

    • Sep 19th

    Plugins

  • which-jspmstars0 - Adds npm, yarn or pnpm to the end of your prompt depending on what lockfile(s) it detects in the current directory.

    • Sep 16th

    Plugins

  • mkarchstars3 - ZSH plugin that allows you to create archives using multiple different compression formats.

    • Sep 14th

    Plugins

  • zmanstars11 - Use fzfstars47.5k to quickly browse ZSH manuals.
  • zoostars2 - Casual theme with animal emoji. Includes decorators for current directory, time and git status.
  • notenotestars1 - Makes it easy to take notes.

    • Sep 13th

    Themes

  • cravendstars0 - Includes hostname decorator (only in active ssh sessions) and git status decorations.

    • Plugins

  • autodark (cravend)stars3 - Switches between user-specified light and dark themes. Only works on macOS.
  • autodark (vbwx)stars0 - Switches to another Terminal profile if dark mode is enabled (macOS-only).

    • Sep 12th

    Completions

  • openstackstars0 - Add functions and aliases for managing OpenStack.
  • symfony (TheGrowingPlant)stars4 - Autocompletion for Symfony 3 and 4 commands.

    • Plugins

  • symfony (voronkovich)stars5 - ZSH plugin for Symfony.

    • Sep 11th

    Themes

  • thyme (chenhao-ye)stars17 - Seasoning for shells. Based on bira, gnzh, and bullet-train.

    • Sep 10th

    Completions

  • pagerdutystars0 - Adds completions for the pagerduty clistars48

    • Sep 8th

    Completions

  • prettierstars0 - Tab completion for prettier
  • complete-macstars0 - Add completions for macOS ioreg, lsmp, scselect, system_profiler and tmutil commands.

    • Sep 7th

    Themes

  • ketlrzntstars0 - Simple theme with git decorations.

    • Sep 6th

    Plugins

  • command-not-found (freed-wu)stars1 - Uses the command-not-found package for zsh to provide suggested packages to be installed if a command cannot be found.
  • command-not-found (tarrasch)stars20 - A mirror of the oh-my-zsh command-not-found plugin so you don't have to include all of oh-my-zsh.

    • Sep 5th

    Plugins

  • archlinuxstars2 - Based on the oh-my-zsh archlinux plugin. Defines helper functions and aliases.

    • Sep 2nd

    Themes

  • bashplusstars0 - Colorized replica of the default bash prompt with decorators for virtualenv and git status.

    • Aug 27th

    Themes

  • nanikastars0 - Optimized variant of robbyrussell. Includes git status decorations.

    • Aug 26th

    Themes

  • kawaiistars0 - Has terminal and virtual console modes. Includes decorators for username, directory, last command exit status, timestamp and git status.

    • Aug 25th

    Completions

  • mcflystars4.5k - Replaces your default ctrl-r shell history search with an intelligent search engine that takes into account your working directory and the context of recently executed commands. McFly's suggestions are prioritized in real time with a small neural network.

    • Aug 23rd

    Plugins

  • qwystars0 - ZSH fuzzy completion plugin.

    • Themes

  • born-in-the-purplestars1 - Simple theme with a purple motif. Inspired by Purestars11.7k.

    • Aug 20th

    Plugins

  • zredis-cmdstars4 - Utilizes variable sharing done by zredisstars1 plugin to implement remote command execution.

    • Aug 18th

    Themes

  • smellystars0 - Minimalist prompt that includes decorators for Python venv and git status.

    • Aug 17th

    Plugins

  • pseudo-projectilestars0 - Like projectile in emacs? This adds similar functionality to your ZSH environment.

    • Aug 15th

    Completions

  • elmstars3 - Tab completion for elm.

    • Themes

  • zskaistars3 - Simple theme based on Monokai. Includes decorators for user@hostname, time, git status and current working directory.

    • Aug 13th

    Plugins

  • fzf-fasdstars48 - Integrates fzfstars47.5k and fasdstars5.8k --- tab completion of z with fzf's fuzzy search!
  • fzf-zstars158 - Brings together the *z- plugin and *fzfstars47.5k- to allow you to easily browse recently used directories at any point on the command line.

    • Aug 12th

    Plugins

  • downloadstars1 - Helper to download files with aria2c.
  • cvideostars0 - Quickly compress video with ffmpeg.
  • requirestars0 - Adds ability to require commandname and then (if brew is installed) automatically brew install commandname if it isn't already installed.

    • Aug 11th

    Plugins

  • xdg-basedirstars0 - Supports XDG base directory settings.

    • Aug 7th

    Themes

  • danielparksstars0 - Works well on dark backgrounds. Includes decorators for git status, user@host when in an ssh session, success/failure of last command, working directory, python virtualenv, execution time of last command and whether running as root.

    • Plugins

  • alias-finderstars2 - Displays an alias when you use a command you have aliased previously. Helpful for remembering aliases you have defined in the past. Written as a pure ZSH script for speed

    • Aug 6th

    Completions

  • fzshellstars52 - Fetches fuzzy completions from sources predefined by a user.
  • osx-zsh-completionsstars8 - Tab completions for some macOS-specific commands like launchctl.
  • completions (zchee)stars88 - Yet another collection of tab completions.
  • completions (clarketm)stars39 - This includes the zsh-userscompletionsstars5.6k, zchee's completionsstars88, nilsonholger's osx-zsh-completionsstars8 and various other custom completions.
  • completions (zsh-users)stars5.6k - A collection of extra completions for ZSH.
  • pipxstars1 - Tab completions for pipxstars5.6k.

    • Themes

  • odrastars2 - Colorful, works well on dark backgrounds. Includes decorators for git status, current directory, username and exit status of the last command.

    • Aug 1st

    Plugins

  • shellfirmstars634 - Shellfirm is a handy utility to help avoid running dangerous commands without an extra step of approval. When risky patterns is detected you will immediately get a small prompt challenge that will verify your action.

    • Jul 31st

    Plugins

  • 1passwordstars0 - Adds 1Password functionality including a opswd command that wraps the op command. It takes a service name as an argument and copies the password for that service to the clipboard.
  • ranger-autojumpstars65 - Adds autojumpstars14.3k support to the rangerstars12.2k console file manager.
  • raspberryPi4Temperature - Puts the Raspberry Pi temperature into a spaceship prompt segment
  • prettypingstars1 - Adds a wrapper around the standard ping tool with the objective of making the output prettier, more colorful, more compact, and easier to read.

    • Jul 30th

    Themes

  • pyhackstars1 - Works well with dark terminal themes. Shows Python version, Python package version (pyproject.toml) and git current branch information.

    • Jul 28th

    Plugins

  • jqstars146 - Interactively build jq expressions. Also supports gojqstars2.3k. Requires fzfstars47.5k.

    • Themes

  • jnooreestars0 - Minimalist theme with colors adapted from the robbyrussell theme. Includes decorators for git status, whether running as non-default user and current working directory.

    • Jul 25th

    Plugins

  • pipenv (owenstranathan)stars18 - Automatically activates a pipenv when entering a directory if there is Pipfile in that directory. Includes pipenv completions.
  • pipenv (sudosubin)stars0 - Enables pipenv's $PATH and adds completions.

    • Jul 24th

    Themes

  • shinkansenstars0 - A fast, customizable and easily extended theme. Includes decorators for rhw python version in the active virtualenv, current ruby version if you're using chruby, current node.js version, current java version, current go version, current perl version if using chperl, current elixir version, git status, time, current directory, exit code and execution time of the last command, and an optional custom message. Requires a powerline-compatible font.

    • Jul 22nd

    Plugins

  • alehousestars8 - Contains short aliases for brew commands, inspired by betterbrew.
  • auto-fortune-cowsaystars5 - Prints out an ASCII picture of a cow saying a random epigram on every ZSH start.
  • aws-cli-mfastars16 - AWS CLI MFA plugin based on sweharris' aws-cli-mfastars21. Supports specifying mfa_device in profile.
  • aws-pluginstars2 - Adds helper functions for aws command. Includes mfa and assume-role helpers.
  • boss-dockerstars1 - Manages docker on macOS.
  • bumblebeestars2 - A plugin to toggle prepending optirun in the command line.
  • cdrstars12 - Easy setup of cdr for ZSH.
  • chgostars0 - Clone of chruby modified to make it easy to switch between multiple Go versions.
  • copierstars1 - Standalone clipboard utilities from oh-my-zsh.
  • declare-zshstars5 - A parser for zinitstars1.4k commands in .zshrc. It allows you to perform the following actions on .zshrc from the command-line - enable and disable plugins add or remove snippets.
  • evil-registersstars25 - Extends ZLE vi commands to remotely access named registers of the vim and nvim editors, and system selection and clipboard.
  • exa (zplugin)stars6 - replace ls with ogham/exastars19.5k.
  • f-shortcutsstars4 - Makes a shortcuts toolbar using F1 to F12 keys.
  • fancy-ctrl-zstars12 - Broken out version of the version in oh-my-zsh so users of other frameworks don't have to import all of oh-my-zsh.
  • get-jquerystars1 - Plugin for fast downloading the jQuery library from code.jquery.com.
  • gimmestars1 - Manage Go installations with gimmestars669.
  • git-aliases (mdumitru)stars22 - Broken out version of the version in oh-my-zsh so users of other frameworks don't have to import all of oh-my-zsh.
  • git-is-cleanstars1 - This function will return true or false depending on if it finds out your git repo is dirty or not.
  • git-smart-commends-wrapperstars0 - Wraps git-smart-commandsstars12 to make it compatible with the oh-my-zsh plugins system.
  • history-popupstars0 - Captures the PageUp key and uses dialog to open a popup menu with the history, so the user can interactively navigate through it and pick the history line to bring back to the prompt.
  • iterm2stars9 - Packs iTerm 2's ZSH integration scripts into a ZSH plugin to avoid polluting your $HOME directory, with a negligible time increase of only 2ms.
  • jenv-lazystars5 - A ZSH plugin for lazy loading of jEnv.
  • kitsunebookstars0 - KitsuneBook plugin for oh-my-zsh.
  • last-working-dir-tmuxstars1 - Keeps track of the last used working directory globally and per tmuxstars26.4k session and automatically jumps into it for new shells.
  • lesaint-gitstars0 - Replacement git plugin for oh-my-zsh-compatible frameworks.
  • lesaint-mvnstars0 - Maven plugins for oh-my-zsh.
  • luxstars22 - ZSH plugin to toggle the light & dark modes of macOS and other items and applications via the lux command. Highly customizable: included items can be configured by defining variables. Highly extensible: items can be added by defining functions. Includes a macos_is_dark helper function to determine if the macOS dark mode is active for use in theming.
  • mercurialstars2 - Extracted from oh-my-zsh so you can use it without the rest of oh-my-zsh.
  • pkenvstars1 - Installs and loads pkenvstars50.
  • pluginstars12 - Creates custom oh-my-zsh plugins from a boilerplate template. Very oh-my-zsh centric, the generated plugins will need editing to work with other frameworks.
  • rbenv (ecortinas)stars2 - Based on the zsh-pyenvstars37 plugin. This plugin will install rbenv and make it readily available
  • rvmstars2 - Initiates rvmstars4.8k and adds rubygem binaries (like compass) accessible in the user's $PATH.
  • virtualenv-modstars1 - A modified virtualenv ZSH plugin for oh-my-zsh.
  • virtualenv-promptstars36 - A fork of the virtualenv plugin from upstream oh-my-zsh. Adds support for customizing the virtualenv prompt in oh-my-zsh themes.
  • yadmstars9 - Displays a warning if there are local yadm configuration changes.
  • yeomanstars40 - Edouard Lopez's Yeoman plugin for oh-my-zsh, compatible with yeoman version ≥1.0 (includes options and command auto-completion).
  • zshmarksstars249 - A port of Bashmarks (by Todd Werth), a simple command line bookmarking plugin, for oh-my-zsh.

    • Themes

  • vehemencestars0 - Includes decorators for pwd, user@host, tty, time, last command exit code and git status.
  • bearingsstars176 - A fast, clean, super-customizable shell prompt. Includes decorators for current directory, git status, exit code of last command, duration of last command, background jobs & username.

    • Jul 20th

    Plugins

  • tgenvstars0 - Installs and loads tgenvstars181. Includes a function to manually update tgenv.

    • Jul 17th

    Themes

  • githubstars1 - A GitHub-inspired theme. Shows decorators for (truncated) current directory, hostname and git status. Includes both light and dark modes and detects system settings for that on macOS and Linux.

    • Jul 14th

    Themes

  • zpstars4 - Fast prompt, written in zig. Includes git status and current directory decorators.
  • itlbvstars0 - Minimalist. Includes decorators for git status and the current directory.

    • Jul 13th

    Completions

  • ansible-serverstars2 - Completions for viasite-ansible/ansible-serverstars14.

    • Themes

  • cmder-wslstars0 - Configuration file for cmderthat is configured to work in quake mode with ZSH and a modified Agnoster theme.
  • zeitstars166 - Optimized for dark backgrounds, includes git status information.

    • Plugins

  • ansimotdstars4 - Adds old-school cool ANSI art when a login shell starts.
  • autoswitch-virtualenvstars346 - ZSH plugin to automatically switch python virtualenvs and pipenvs when traversing directories. Automatically detects pipenv and poetry projects.
  • autoupdate-antigenstars26 - Antigenstars7.3k doesn't do automatic updates like oh-my-zsh. This plugin adds auto updating for antigen, both of antigen and the bundles loaded in your configuration.
  • autoupdate-oh-my-zsh-pluginsstars171 - oh-my-zsh doesn't automatically update non-core plugins, this adds plugin autoupdating git repositories in the $ZSH_CUSTOM directory.
  • awsstars0 - Forked from the original oh-my-zsh aws. Includes completions for awscli and a few utilities for managing AWS profiles and displaying them in your prompt.
  • azclistars1 - Helper for using the Azure cli tools.
  • azure-keyvaultstars0 - Makes using Azure keyvaults less verbose from the cli.
  • depot-toolsstars0 - Simple oh-my-zsh plugin for installing the chromium depot_tools. Installing this plugin will add all of the chromium depot_tools to your $PATH automatically.
  • diff-so-fancystars7 - Automatically installs diff-so-fancystars15.9k and enables its use in ZSH and git.
  • dirstackstars1 - Plugin for displaying the dirstack info on a single line.
  • docker-aliasesstars7 Docker aliases for everyday use.
  • docker-composestars45 Show docker container status in your prompt.
  • docker-helpersstars24 - A collection of docker helper scripts.
  • dropboxstars21 - A dropbox plugin for ZSH that provides dropbox-cli and dropbox-uploader commands.
  • emacs (flinner)stars2 - Uses the Emacs daemon capability, allowing the user to quickly open frames, whether they are opened in a terminal via a ssh connection, or X frames opened on the same host.
  • emojisstars12 - Adds numerous ASCII art emojis to your environment in convenient variables.
  • extend-historystars9 - Extends command history by adding the exit code for each command in the history.
  • fzf-itstars2 - Make any command interactive wrapping it with fzfstars47.5k functionality.
  • gimbo-gitstars0 - A subset of the oh-my-zsh git plugin aliases, plus some new aliases, plus a few handy functions.
  • git-acpstars5 - Take the current command line as the commit message and then run git pull, git add, git commit and git push with one keystroke.
  • git-lfsstars3 - Adds short aliases for the git-lfs commands.
  • gitstars31 - Replacement for the stock oh-my-zsh git plugin. Provides quite a few useful aliases and functions. The motivation to replace the default plugin stems from the fact that it comes with some inconsistencies that make a few popular commands rather unintuitive, so this plugin makes the aliases consistent.
  • gitfaststars7 - Updated fork of the oh-my-zsh gitfast plugin.
  • goenv (CDA0) - Plugin for installing, updating and loading goenv.
  • gtrstars0 - Allows fast tagging of a release in git using the tag name *release-YYYY-MM-DD-HH-MM- and headline Release YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM.
  • gvm (dgnest)stars3 - A gvm (Go version manager) plugin for ZSH.
  • hacker-quotesstars84 - Outputs a random hacker quote when you open a terminal.
  • hadoop-pluginstars0 - Adds some convenience aliases for hadoop functions.
  • hangulstars134 - Auto correct hangul(한글, korean) to English when it was supposed to be typed in English. 영어를 타이핑 해야되는데 한글로 타이핑된경우 자동으로 수정합니다.
  • history-syncstars185 - An oh-my-zsh plugin for GPG encrypted, Internet synchronized ZSH history using git.
  • laravel-austars8 - Adds aliases for Laravel 6.
  • laravelstars16 - Add shortcuts for Laravel 5, 5.1, 5.2 & 5.3.
  • macos (zshzoo)stars8 - ZSH goodies for macOS users.
  • maven-pluginstars0 - A fork of the oh-my-zsh maven plugin.
  • msf - Metasploit handler plugin for starting handlers easily.
  • mvn-contextsstars3 - Allows fast switching between maven configurations.
  • nice-exit-codestars35 - Maps exit status codes to human readable strings.
  • pacistars1 - Plugin for arch linux package managers.
  • pr-returnstars1 - Plugin for ZSH which displays the exit status of the last command run.
  • rbenv (elliottcable)stars4 - A faster fork of the rbenv plugin from oh-my-zsh.
  • rbenv (jsahlen)stars0 - Variant based on the original oh-my-zsh rbenv plugin.
  • redisstars4 - Will run redis-server pointing it to the redis.conf configuration file. This can be used with the zdharma/zredisstars4 plugin to share variables between shells.
  • ruststars0 - Configure your rust toolchain, installing rustup if it is not currently installed already.
  • safe-kubectlstars4 - Add some safety when running kubectl by warning what context you're in after a definable number of seconds since the last kubectl command.
  • safe-rmstars14 - Add safe-rm functionality so that rm will put files in your OS' trash instead of permanently deleting them.
  • saneoptstars19 - Sane defaults for ZSH options, in the spirit of vim-sensiblestars4.8k.
  • sublimestars3 - Same as the official Sublime plugin for Oh My Zsh, but this opens files in the current Sublime window, if there is one already open.
  • sudo (hcgraf)stars27 - The sudo plugin from oh-my-zsh, extracted to a standalone. Toggles sudo before the current/previous command by pressing *ESC-ESC- in emacs-mode or vi-command mode.
  • svn-n-zshstars5 - Rewrite of the stock oh-my-zsh svn plugin.
  • syntax-highlightingstars15.5k - Add syntax highlighting to your ZSH. Make sure you load this before zsh-users/zsh-history-substring-searchstars1.9k or they will both break.
  • system-clipboardstars102 - Adds key bindings support for ZLE (Zsh Line Editor) clipboard operations for vi emulation keymaps. It works under Linux, macOS and Android (via Termux).
  • terminal-appstars12 - A plugin for integrating with the new macOS El Capitan Terminal.app features.
  • termuxstars1 - Adds compatibility for Termux.
  • terraform (hanjunlee)stars0 - Add terraform workspace to prompt.
  • terraform (jsporna)stars2 - Extends the original oh-my-zsh plugin with aliases and tab completions. Adds workspace (when not default) to prompt.
  • terraform (thuandt)stars1 - Adds convenience aliases for terraform, along with completions for terraform and terragrunt.
  • tfenvstars2 - Installs, updates, and loads tfenv inspired by zsh-pyenvstars37
  • travisstars4 - Opens the Travis CI page for the current repo if one exists.
  • unique-idstars6 - Provides a unique number that identifies a running Zshell session, in its shell variable $ZUID_ID. Besides this unique number, also a unique codename is provided, in shell variable $ZUID_CODENAME. An example use case is to hold logs in files .../mylog-${ZUID_CODENAME}.log, so that two different Zshells will not write to the same file at the same time.
  • update-zshstars2 - Updates custom oh-my-zsh plugins. Only works with the oh-my-zsh framework.
  • uvenvstars2 - Extends the functionality of the original oh-my-zsh venv module.
  • vaporstars1 - Laravel vaporstars262 plugin for ZSH to help you to run vapor from anywhere in the project tree, with auto-completion!
  • vi-mode (jeffreytse)stars1.5k - 💻 A better and friendly vi(vim) mode plugin for ZSH.
  • virtuozzo-pluginstars1 - An oh-my-zsh plugin for the virtuozzo bare-metal virtualization system.
  • voxstars8 - An oh-my-zsh plugin to control VOX, a lightweight full-featured audio player for macOS that can play a variety of formats including FLAC and Ogg Vorbis.
  • vscstars1 - Plugin for Visual Studio Code on macOS.
  • vscode (kasperhesthaven)stars1 - Simple plugin to open Visual Studio Code a little more easily across systems.
  • vtermstars0 - Lets you run emacs commands directly from vtermstars78 shell sessions.
  • yapipenvstars0 - Automatically activate a directory's pip environment if pipenv detects the presence of one.
  • yupstars0 - Adds helper function to upgrade all the dependencies in a yarn/npm project.
  • zellij (jaeheonji)stars6 - Provides an environment that uses zellijstars8.5k. Requires tmuxstars26.4k.
  • zgen-compinit-tweakstars3 - Make compinit run only once after all loading is done by zgenstars1.4k.
  • zsh-in-dockerstars508 - Automates ZSH + oh-my-zsh installation into development containers. Works with Alpine, Ubuntu, Debian, CentOS or Amazon Linux.
  • zsh-not-vimstars4 - Provides a function that automatically shames the user for forgetting they weren't in vim.

    • Jul 10th

    Themes

  • neostars3 - Includes decorators for git status, current directory, user@hostname, time, and whether running as root.

    • Jul 9th

    Tutorials

    Zinit (né zplugin)

  • BlaCk-Void-Zshstars310 - 🔮 Awesome, customable Zsh Starter Kit 🌠🌠. Includes powerline, fzfstars47.5k integration, Weather and image viewing in some terminals.

    • Plugins

  • git-fuzzystars2k - A CLI interface to git that relies heavily on fzfstars47.5k.
  • git-worktreestars12 - Wraps some git worktree operations for simplicity and productivity. Includes fzfstars47.5k tooling.
  • last-working-directorystars7 - Broken out copy of the version in oh-my-zsh. Keeps track of the last used working directory and automatically jumps into it for new shells.
  • media-syncstars0 - A plugin to facilitate copying media between two rclone locations.
  • mysql-colorizestars91 - Adds color for mysql tables.
  • mysqlstars15 - Adds some functions for dealing with mysql.
  • node-pathstars3 - Automatically adds the npm bin of your current directory to your path.
  • nodenv (c-uo)stars0 - Looks for nodenv in your working directory and loads it when found.
  • npmsstars5 - Utility powered by fzfstars47.5k for using npm scripts interactively. Requires fzfstars47.5k and jq.
  • peco-historystars111 - Search shell history with Peco when pressing ctrl+R.
  • pip-envstars4 - Automatic pipenv activation upon entry into a pipenv project.
  • project (gko)stars19 - Create node/python/ruby projects both locally and on github(private or public repository).
  • rbenv (meroje)stars2 - Inspired by https://github.com/lukechilds/zsh-nvm/stars1.9k, makes it easier to work with ruby rbenv environments.
  • session-saucestars27 - An fzfstars47.5k interface for tmux session creation and management for all your projects.

    • Completions

  • kubectl-fzfstars368 - Fast and powerful fzfstars47.5k-powered autocompletion for kubectl.
  • aws_manager completionsstars1 - Add completions for the aws_manager CLI.
  • brew-servicesstars19 - Completion plugin for homebrew services.
  • cabal (d12frosted)stars0 - Adds autocompletion for cabal.
  • carapacestars55 - Completion generator for Bash, Elvish, Fish, Oil, Powershell, Xonsh and ZSH. Note - this does not automatically generate completions as needed, you have to explicitly run it to generate completions for a command.
  • cargostars14 - All the functionality of the original oh-my-zsh cargo completion, with additional support for remote crates via cargo search in cargo add.
  • rancherstars9 - Add completions for the Rancher CLI.
  • test-kitchenstars6 - Add completions for Test Kitchenstars1.8k).

    • Themes

  • codemachinestars6 - Displays decorators for git info, whether you're logged in via ssh, and the return code of last command.

    • Jul 8th

    Plugins

  • fuzzy-wdstars1 - Adds fuzzy search for directories warped with the WD plugin.

    • Jul 7th

    Themes

  • tarcadiastars2 - Based on jonathan. Includes decorators for current directory and git status.

    • Jul 6th

    Plugins

  • zpystars31 - Manage Python Environments, dependencies, and isolated app installations, with a ZSH frontend to pip-toolsstars6.3k.

    • Completions

  • kubectl-pluginstars7 - Generates kubectl completion scripts to extend the kubectl auto complete functionality to accomodate for plugin sub-commands.

    • Jul 5th

    Plugins

  • base16stars16 - Adds a script to allow you to change your shell's default ANSI colors but most importantly, colors 17 to 21 of your shell's 256 colorspace (if supported by your terminal). This script makes it possible to honor the original bright colors of your shell (e.g. bright green is still green and so on) while providing additional base16 colors to applications such as Vim.

    • Jul 3rd

    Themes

  • hackersaurusstars10 - A theme with git status and exit code of last command run decorators embedded in the prompt. Related to powerlevel9kstars13.4k.
  • hydrogenstars0 - A simple multiline ZSH theme. It shows username, hostname, current directory and git status decorations.
  • iaystars2 - A {ba,z}sh prompt written in Rust. Includes decorations for the current directory and git status.
  • igorsilvastars10 - Shows current directory, customizable delimiter, current branch, and git status decorators.
  • jclstars2 - Loosely based on the ys theme.
  • jovialstars267 - Shows decorators for host, user, path, development environment, git branch, and which python venv is active.
  • lambda (cdimascio)stars54 - Inspired by the lambda theme. Includes git status decorations.
  • lambda-purestars109 - A minimal ZSH theme, based on purestars11.7k, with added NodeJS version decorator.
  • minimal (glsorre)stars0 - A minimal asynchronous ZSH theme optimized for use with the Fira Codestars66.7k font and the Solarized Light terminal theme.
  • phantomkstars2 - Colorful theme, includes golang version, node version and git status.
  • powerline-pillsstars17 - Written in Ruby, uses powerline characters to simulate pills with useful information.
  • pure-agnosterstars4 - Mashup of purestars11.7k and agnoster. Has git decorations and works well with both dark and light terminal backgrounds.
  • puritystars14 - Inspired by the robbyrussell theme and the purestars11.7k prompt.
  • quewuistars1 - Simple and clean theme optimized for dark terminal themes. Includes decorations for the current time, user, directory and git status.
  • remolueoendstars0 - Based on Agnosterstars3.6k, using emojis for tracking git context. Only works with Preztostars13k.
  • rzhstars2 - Theme with git states indicated by emojis.
  • samshellstars1 - A minimalist ZSH theme with git, kubernetes and python virtualenv decorations.
  • schminitz-v2stars0 - Shows decorators for git status, user@host information, the exit status of last command, and whether running as root.
  • senpaistars11 - Clean prompt theme for Devops. Includes decorators for git status, the kubernetes context, AWS profile, GCP project and Azure active cloud.
  • seti_UXstars2 - A simple oh-my-zsh-compatible theme with a corresponding iTerm 2 color scheme.
  • shellderstars262 - Minimal theme with a git branch decorator. Requires a Powerline-compatible font.
  • shrugstars4 - Simple theme which includes decorations for the current directory and git information.
  • shuttlestars1 - Written in golang. Has decorators for OS, user, current directory, and the exit code of the last command run.
  • simple (rkitover)stars1 - A simple, lightweight, and nice looking prompt that runs quickly even in very slow shells like MSYS2, Cygwin and WSL. It shows decorations for the short name of the current environment (distribution, OS, etc.) the git branch when in a git checkout, as well as the last command exit status (green checkmark for success and red X mark for non-zero exit).
  • spaceshipstars17.5k - Theme with git, nvm, rvm/rbenv/chruby, python, ssh and other useful status decorators.
  • steef (danihodovic)stars4 - Oh-my-zsh steeef theme as a standalone repository. The purpose behind this repo is avoid having a dependency on oh-my-zsh when using the steeef theme. ZSH plugin managers such as Antibody can use the theme without having to use oh-my-zsh.
  • tsotrastars1 - Minimalist theme, includes decorators for git status, k8s context, and rvm status.
  • ultimatestars12 - Minimalist theme with decorators for git status, vim mode indicator and shortened path.
  • vinhnxstars7 - Modified from mgutz. Looks great when using with a Solarizedstars15.3k color scheme.
  • xxf - Shows the current git commit's shortened hash and message.
  • ys-clusterstars1 - ys variant with support for working with batch submission systems for large clusters. Supports Slurm, LSF / IBM Spectrum LSF, and PBS.
  • ysrstars0 - Based on ys. Includes git status decorations.
  • zetastars211 - Shows decorations for username, git status information, machine name, the current working directory and success/fail status of last command.
  • absolutestars34 - Very clean looking theme with decorators for git status, node version and the exit code from the last command.
  • adamdodevstars1 - Includes decorators for git status, the name of your AWS profile, the name of your Azure Service Principal, kubernetes context, terraform workspace, last command exit status and current working directory.
  • agnoster (fcamblor)stars242 - Solarized Agnoster variant with git status information. Requires a unicode font and works best with a solarizedstars15.3k terminal.
  • agnoster (fseguin)stars3 - agnoster variant with a right prompt.
  • agnoster-jstars18 - Optimized for solarized color scheme, git or other VCS tools, and unicode-compatible fonts. Includes decorators for status of last command run, user@hostname, git status, working directory, whether running as root, whether background jobs are running, and other information.
  • aritystars0 - A simple theme designed for readability and to give an overview at a glance. Includes path and git decorations.
  • black-Voidstars310 - Includes account info, root user, using ssh, directory lotation, write permission, and vcs info decorations.
  • bruntystars4 - Includes git status decorations.
  • bttf-colorstars1 - BTTF color theme. Includes git status decorations.
  • bureaustars27 - A clear and informative two-lined prompt. Includes git status optimized for large repositories.
  • chrisandrew.clstars3 - Includes git decorations. Requires a powerline-compatible terminal font.
  • classyTouchNamestars0 - Inspired by classyTouchstars52. Works better with dark backgrounds. Includes git status decorations.
  • coffeenostorstars0 - Based on agnoster, with a right-prompt for vi-mode that displays --INSERT-- and --NORMAL--, in a powerline look.
  • cutestars28 - A macOS oh-my-zsh shell theme with cute emoji based on the Powerline Vim plugin.
  • dissonancestars4 - Comes with custom LSCOLORS and LS_COLORS settings files, works with both dark and light terminal themes.
  • fishstars7 - ZSH theme reminiscent of the default fish shell theme. Includes git status decorations.
  • gaiastars3 - Originally a fork of Bureaustars27 adds new virtual environments info to the prompt: Kubernetes, virtualenv, rbenv and Java versions. Includes git status integration.
  • gentoostars1 - Breaks out the oh-my-zsh gentoo theme into a separate repository for non-omz users.
  • git-prompt (woefe)stars162 - A fast, customizable, pure-shell, asynchronous git-aware prompt for ZSH heavily inspired by Olivier Verdier's zsh-git-promptstars1.6k and very similar to the "Informative VCS" prompt of fish shell.
  • glimmerstars1 - Includes git branch, time and user@host decorators.
  • gocillastars0 - Theme for iTerm 2 and ZSH. Uncludes git status, user@host, path and date decorators.
  • grsstars0 - Includes git status, user id and working directory decorators.
  • ortiz (guezwhoz)stars30 - Simplified fork of erinerstars13 with git status, kubectl context and elapsed time decorations.

    • Jul 2nd

    Plugins

  • skim (casonadams)stars1 - Tries to determine where skimstars3.5k is installed, then enables its fuzzy auto-completion and key bindings.
  • skim (hackerchai)stars3 - Adds support for skimstars3.5k

    • Jul 1st

    Plugins

  • zlong_alertstars32 - Uses notify-send and rings a bell to alert you when a command that has taken a long time (default: 15 seconds) has completed.
  • zinit-annex-submodsstars5 - zinitstars1.4k extension that allows installing and managing additional submodules within a plugin or snippet.
  • zimfw-extrasstars0 - Custom extras for zimfwstars2.8k, packaged into a zimfw plugin.
  • zerostars15 - Zero is both a plugin and a theme. See the github page for installation details. Includes git and hg status decorators.
  • zbrowsestars5 - When doing shell work, it is often the case that echo $variable is invoked multiple times, to check the result of a loop, etc. With ZBrowse, you just need to press Ctrl-B, which invokes the ZBrowse – Zshell variable browser.
  • activate-py-environmentstars5 - Automagically detects and activates your python environments (poetry, virtualenv and conda) while traversing directories.

    • Jun 24th

    Themes

  • snazzystars0 - A powerline-style prompt. Includes segments for current working directory, error status of the last command, git status information, hostname and username. Requires libgit2.
  • ribbonstars0 - Reminiscent of powerline. Includes Python virtualenv decorator.

    • Jun 22nd

    Plugins

  • ls (twopizza9621536)stars0 - Adds some more aliases for ls.
  • ls (zpm-zsh)stars71 - Colorizes the output of ls.
  • exa (twopizza9621536)stars1 - Combines DarrinTisdale/zsh-aliases-exastars86, hermitmaster/zsh-exa-pluginstars1, MohamedElashri/exa-zshstars6, ptavares/zsh-exastars8, RitchieS/zsh-exa/stars3, todie/exa.plugin.zshstars1, zplugin/zsh-exastars6 and zsh-exa-ls-pluginstars2. It also adds the default bash ls aliases and changes some aliases to avoid conflicts with other commands that exa does not replace.

    • Jun 21st

    Themes

  • doomstars0 - Doom-inspired. Looks similar to powerline. Has customizable segments, decorators for git status, rust, node.js, python and ruby versions.

  • sudo (none9632)stars1 - Adds sudo as a prefix to the current command by typing ESC-ESC.

    Themes

  • paxtonstars0 - Inspired by powerline. Includes segments for git branch, time, last command exit status and current directory. Requires a powerline-compatible font.

  • smartcachestars5 - Caches command output to speed up shell startup time.
  • git-syncstars42 - A ZSH plugin to sync git repositories and clean them up.

  • yellow-sea-diamondsstars0 - Includes decorations for git status, current directory, active python virtual environment, and the exit status of the last command run.

  • gusrylmubarokstars3 - Includes decorators for git status and last command exit status.

  • myincrstars0 - Speeds up pasting with autosuggest and incr.

    • Jun 6th

    Themes

  • ivabusstars2 - Inspired by the GitHub Codespaces prompt. Includes decorators for git status, username and current directory.
  • gugulenokstars0 - Has both a dark and a light mode. Includes decorators for git status, time and current directory.

    • Jun 5th

    Tutorials

    Generic ZSH

  • adamnorwood-zshstars2 - A minimalist but readable ZSH setup based on oh-my-posh.

    • Plugins

  • quotifystars4 - Displays inspiring coding quotes from our pairs when starting up.

    • Jun 4th

    Themes

  • owczarczakstars0 - Inspired by bira, dieter and fino-time. Includes venv and vcs status decorations.
  • djkakarotostars0 - Includes git status decorations, works with all fonts.

    • May 31st

    Themes

  • mainnikastars0 - Includes decorators for last command exit status and the 1, 5 and 15 minute load averages.

    • May 30th

    Plugins

  • goenv (heyvito)stars1 - Automatically reads .goenv files in the current directory and sets GOPRIVATE environment variables.

    • May 29th

    Themes

  • cryo-longstars0 - Variant of cryostars1 with added decorators for hostname and current directory.
  • acenosterstars1 - A multi-purpose theme with very detailed git and mercurial support. Also includes decorators for AWS profile name, virtual environment name if any, number of background tasks, current directory and previous command's exit code if non-zero.

    • May 28th

    Themes

  • galstars0 - Minimalist theme based on gallois.
  • headlinestars96 - A responsive ZSH theme featuring Git status information and a colored line above the prompt.

    • May 23rd

    Themes

  • majemojistars1 - Adds a random emoji to each session's prompt. Includes git status decorations.

    • May 22nd

    Themes

  • novastars0 - Includes git status decroations. Overrides LS_COLORS and LSCOLORS settings.

    • May 21st

    Completions

  • vorpalstars1 - Adds completions for some projects whose upstream appears dead, including duperemovestars487, optimus-managerstars1.8k and pacutilsstars84.

    • May 20th

    Plugins

  • condaenvstars0 - Provides a condaenv_prompt_info function which returns the current conda environment name.

    • Tutorials

    Generic ZSH

  • zephyrstars12 - Zephyr uses built-in Zsh features to set up better default options, completions, keybindings, history, and much more.

    • Themes

  • repostars0 - Shows detailed git status information

    • May 19th

    Plugins

  • git-clean-branchstars0 - Cleans up dead git branches.

    • May 18th

    Themes

  • promptorstars0 - Powerline-inspired. Includes decorators for git status, username, hostname, working directory and time.

    • May 17th

    Themes

  • simple-chackstars0 - Works well with solarized terminal color scheme. Includes git status decorations.

    • May 16th

    Themes

  • luceaststars0 - Optimized for git. Includes decorations for username, host, time & working directory.

    • May 14th

    Themes

  • arrowstars0 - Minimal theme, includes git status decorations.
  • shiftysstars0 - Tweaked version of the kali theme.

    • May 12th

    Themes

  • ultimatorstars0 - Agnoster-like theme. Includes decorators for current directory, user@host, python virtualenv, background jobs, last command exit status, and git status information. Requires zsh-git-promptstars0 plugin and Nerdfonts.

    • May 10th

    Completions

  • click-completionstars264 - Add automatic completion support for Click, including displaying the options and commands help during the tab completion.
  • brew-completionsstars5 - Brings Homebrew Shell Completion under the control of ZSH & ZIstars357.

    • Themes

  • 021011stars30 - Minimalist. Includes a single git marker for VS Code.

    • Plugins

  • zi-rbenvstars5 - Fast rbenv loads if you're using zistars357.

    • May 9th

    Themes

  • inthedeepspacestars1 - Based on intheloop and inspired by vim-deep-spacestars268.

    • Other Resources

    ZSH Tools

  • shtabstars205 - Automatically generate shell tab completion scripts for Python CLI apps, supports zsh, bash and tcsh.

    • May 8th

    Themes

  • thmstars3 - Includes decorators for virtualenv, current directory and git status.

    • May 7th

    Plugins

  • denostars0 - Automatically installs deno to $HOME/.deno on startup if deno is not already installed.

    • May 6th

    Themes

  • pifabsstars0 - Minimal theme with decorators for git status, username, host and working directory.

    • May 4th

    Themes

  • crstars0 - Includes directory, time, host name, last command exit status, and git status decorations.

    • May 3rd

    Themes

  • dyzshstars0 - Based on astro. Includes decorators for git branch & hash, current directory, user, host & time.

    • May 1st

    Frameworks

    miniplug

  • No crashes or double plugin loading when re-sourcing .zshrc
  • Unlike other frameworks, Miniplug does not pollute your $PATH

    • Frameworks

    zplug

  • Unlike antigenstars7.3k, no ZSH plugin files (*.plugin.zsh) are required

    • Frameworks

    zpm

  • zpm runs on Linux, macOS, FreeBSD and Android.
  • zpm plugins are compatible with oh-my-zsh.

    • Frameworks

    zshing

  • Keep track of and configure your plugins right in the .zshrc
  • Run the above actions in a single command
  • Manages the Source Plugins of your installed Plugins

    • Apr 30th

    Setups

    zgenom

  • zsh-quickstart-kitstars573 - A simple quickstart for using ZSH with zgenomstars229. This automatically configures ZSH to use zgenomstars229 to load a curated (but easily customizable) collection of plugins and periodically automatically update itself, the plugins, and the quickstart kit itself.

    • Plugins

  • git-worktreesstars1 - Makes git worktrees more functional. Includes tab completions.

    • Themes

  • zenstars9 - A minimalist theme for *NIX systems. Includes decorators for execution time of last command run, vcs status information,
  • brefstars2 - A simple prompt. It includes decorators to display git status asynchronously, a notification if the ssh session is remote, the battery level and the number of background jobs.
  • zshifystars1 - A minimalistic, one command installation to customize your prompt. Requires npx.
  • winlinestars2 - Async version of Greg Hurrell's prompt. Includes decorators for git status, duration of last command, current directory, nested shells, root status.

    • Apr 29th

    Themes

  • igeekstars37 - Displays system information when starting a new terminal session.

    • Apr 26th

    Plugins

  • zshange_directory_recentstars0 - Change to a recent directory. Requires fzfstars47.5k.

  • daily-emojistars0 - Shows random emoji at the beginning of each command depending on the day of the week.

  • npm-scripts-autocompletestars43 - Shows autocomplete suggestions from scripts found in the current directory's package.json. Works with npm and yarn.

  • skill (asafaeirad)stars10 - Includes decorations for working directory, git working branch, working directory status and tracking branch status.
  • skill (frontendmonster)stars10 - Optimized for a dark terminal, displays git status decorations.

  • defstars7 - Allows you to specify and run a default command in any directory of your choice.

  • nhl-schedulestars0 - Retrieves and displays the NHL schedule.

  • up-dirstars0 - Binds ctrl-h to navigating up a directory. This makes it very easy to go up a few directories without having to type any commands.

  • clipperstars0 - Minimalist ZSH theme with git support. It includes decorations for pwd, last command exit status code and git status & branch.

    Plugins

  • bitwarden (kalsowerus)stars10 - Opens a fzfstars47.5k widget containing your Bitwarden vault items. Upon selecting an item either the username or password will be either written into the shell or copied into the clipboard. Requires fzf, jq and bitwarden.
  • bwstars2 - Provides formatting options and easy access to credentials stored in Bitwarden via the Bitwarden CLI. The plugin tries to retrieve a valid session before each action, therefore an explicit login is not nescessary beforehand.

  • tinygostars12 - Add tab completions for tinygo.

  • valetstars7 - Reads .valetphprc from the project root and will switch to that PHP version automatically.

    • Mar 5th

    Themes

  • cmderstars12 - A ZSH theme that matches the theme of Cmder, a popular terminal emulator for windows. Includes node and git status decorations.
  • cnstars0 - Includes username, directory and git status decorations.

    • Mar 4th

    Themes

  • snowflakestars2 - An elegant, simple, and neat ZSH theme including an aesthetically pleasing cool color palette that harmonizes with dark themes.

    • Tutorials

    superconsole - Windows-only.

  • ConEmu/zsh out-of-the-box configured to restore previously opened tabs and shell working directories after ConEmu restart
  • MSYS2 included, zsh and necessary software preinstalled, uses zsh-grml-config
  • Uses Antigenstars7.3k for ZSH theme and config management
  • Git-for-Windows repo with proper git and git lfs support for MSYS2 environment is configured, git client already installed.
  • Non-blocking ZSH prompt status updates thanks to agkozak-zsh-promptstars237
  • Command-not-found handler customized for MSYS2 suggests what package to install

    • Mar 2nd

    Themes

  • mystars0 - Variant of kolo.
  • linearstars4 - Reminiscent of Powerline. Includes segments with git status, Pythonvirtualenv, current directory and current time.
  • fluxstars0 - A no-nonsense minimalist theme with git status decorations.

    • Feb 27th

    Themes

  • boxystars0 - Works well with solarized terminal colors. Includes decorators for username@hostname, current directory, git status, return code for last command, and time last command was run.

    • Feb 26th

    Plugins

  • pyenv (mattberther)stars37 - Inspired by zsh-rbenv. Installs, updates or loads pyenv, and adds extra functionality.
  • pyenv (xlshiz)stars2 - Loads pyenvstars29k into the current shell and provides prompt info via the pyenv_prompt_info function. Also loads pyenv-virtualenvstars5.2k if available.
  • pyenv-lazystars31 - Lazy load pyenvstars29k. The initial eval "$(pyenv init -)" is executed the first time pyenv is called.
  • pyvenv-faststars2 - Launch a Python venv with one command. Designed for use with dotpyvenvstars6.
  • unwrapstars2 - Allows you to remove a directory without removing the contents - it puts them in the directory's parent directory.

    • Feb 25th

    Themes

  • devj121stars0 - Includes git decorations with branch glyphs.

    • Feb 24th

    Themes

  • bernkastelstars1 - Based on ys. Includes decorations for kubernetes context, current directory, last command exit status and git status.

    • Feb 23rd

    Completions

  • macstars135 - Completions files for macOS specific commands and third party tools.

    • Feb 22nd

    Plugins

  • shift-selectstars23 - Emacs shift-select mode for ZSH - select text in the command line using Shift, as in many text editors, browsers and other GUI programs.
  • zservice-py3httpstars4 - Serve a given directory with Python 3's http server from the standard library.

    • Feb 21st

    Completions

  • gardenctlstars0 - Tab completions for the Gardenerstars13 command-line interface, as well as some aliases for common gardenctl commands

    Completions

  • biostars3 - Completions for bioinformatics tools.

    • Feb 18th

    Plugins

  • wsl2-ssh-pageantstars1 - Use your Yubikey stored GPG keys from WSL. This packages the instructions from wsl2-ssh-pageant repostars311 as a ZSH plugin.

    • Feb 17th

    Plugins

  • kubecolor (trejo08)stars2 - Prints colorized outputs from kubectl. Includes helper functions.
  • kubectl-config-switcherstars0 - Switch between config files in ~/.kube via the KUBECTL environment variable.

    • Feb 16th

    Plugins

  • ddevstars0 - A ZSH plugin for the ddevstars1.5k tool for setting up PHP development environments.

    • Feb 15th

    Themes

  • aubstars1 - Includes decorations for git and hg status and username at host.
  • amplifystars0 - Minimalist, includes AWS Amplify envioronment and git status decorations.- andystars0 - Modified bira theme with better git support.
  • 000stars0 - Multiline prompt with username, hostname, full path, return status and git decorations.
  • 0i0stars11 - Optimized for dark terminal windows, uses nerdfont git status decorations.
  • 14degreestars1 - Includes git, virtualenv and rvm status decorations.
  • aaronstars3 - Based on the Sorin theme.
  • abbr (theme)stars1 - Displays an abbreviated version of the current directory path, shows the Python virtualenv, Rust version, git status, and the exit code of last command. Works well on dark backgrounds by default but colors can be easily customized.
  • adlee - macOS theme, requires a Powerline-compatible font.
  • af-magic-dynamicstars1 - Modified version of af-magic with dynamic path shortening.
  • aflah-bharistars0 - Modified version of the robbyrussell theme in oh-my-zsh.
  • aftermathstars1 - Get a nice summary line after each command you run in your shell.
  • agitnosterstars5 - Based on agnoster theme included in Oh My Zshstars151k and bash-git-promptstars6.3k. Shows detailed information about git status.
  • agkozakstars237 - Uses three asynchronous methods to keep the ZSH prompt responsive while displaying the git status and indicators of SSH connection, exit codes, and vi mode, along with an abbreviated, PROMPT_DIRTRIM-style path. Very customizable. Asynchronous even on Cygwin and MSYS2.
  • agnoster-gentoostars1 - A Gentoo flavored version of the Agnoster ZSH Themestars3.6k that includes user@hostname and git status decorations. Works better with a unicode font.
  • agnoster-modstars3 - Agnoster variant with a right-prompt.
  • agnoster-plusstars4 - Agnoster variant optimized for use with Solarized Dark terminal color scheme. Includes git status.
  • agnoster-refreshstars4 - Agnoster variant, includes battery and online status.
  • agnoster-repopathstars2 - Based on Agnosterstars3.6k and Passionstars132 themes. Includes git and mercurial status, current time and time the last command took decorations in the prompt.
  • agnoster-timestamp-newlinestars1 - Agnoster variant with timestamp and newline added.
  • agnosterAfrostars6 - Based on Powerlinestars2.9k and Agnoster themes and inspired by the agnosterzakstars368.
  • agnoster - Optimized for solarized terminal color schemes, shows git decorations, user@host, working directory, the previous command's exit status and whether you are running with root privileges. Requires a Powerline-compatible font.
  • agnosterzakstars368 - Based on Agnoster, shows battery life, date & time, git status, current directory and user & host information.
  • akzshstars1 - Works best with a dark terminal theme, includes git decorations.
  • alarangeirasstars0 - Minimalist theme with git status decorations.
  • alestars3 - Based on the fino theme. Includes git, virtualenv and node status decorations.
  • alien-minimalstars135 - Minimalist ZSH theme with git status displayed.
  • alienstars261 - Powerline-esque ZSH theme that shows git decorations and the exit code of the last command. Faster than many other prompts because it determines the git decorations asynchronously in a background process.
  • almelstars21 - Inspired by agnosterstars3.6k, written in Rust. Includes git status, user@host, last command exit status and working directory decorations
  • alpharizedstars12 - Optimized to work with solarized dark terminals. It's a modified version of the avit theme.
  • amoylystars1 - An elegant and comfortable-reading theme based on Agnoster.
  • angry flystars3 - Shows git information in the right hand prompt.
  • antoinechabstars2 - Includes git status, username, time and current directory decorations.
  • antsystars3 - Shows git branch and status decorations, virtualenv, exit status, jobs count, and vi-mode indicator.
  • aperiodicstars2 - Shows git decorations, user, host, whether root, active Python virtual environment, current Ruby interpreter, visual and numeric status of the last command, power management status and time and date.
  • aphroditestars66 - Minimalistic theme without visual noise. Displays only the necessary information: current user, hostname, working directory, git branch if one exists. Looks great both with dark and white terminals.
  • aplosstars3 - Minimal ZSH prompt with working directory, git local info, git remote info, time and exit code.
  • apollostars65 - A heavily customizable, compatible and performant ZSH theme that uses modules to enable features.
  • apple (aramirol)stars1 - Based on robbyrussell, includes vcs status decorations. Colors customizable by setting vars in your .zshrc.
  • apple (bjrowlett2)stars0 - Minimalist theme with git status decorations.
  • araelstars0 - Fork of gallifrey.
  • archcraftstars7 - Greenish theme, optimized for dark backgrounds. Includes git status decorations.
  • archiestars1 - Arch Linux inspired ZSH theme. Based on the norm theme.
  • aronhoyerstars0 - Minimalist theme with right-side git status decorations.
  • arrow-minimalstars0 - A minimal ZSH theme with git decorations.
  • asciigitstars4 - An ASCII-only theme for git users who don't want to use fonts with extra glyphs.
  • asqstars0 - Based on theunraveler.
  • astralstars12 - Theme for dark backgrounds with zen mode. Works well with the zsh-users zsh-syntax-highlightingstars15.5k plugin.
  • astro - Based on the ys and robbyrussell themes.
  • asyncstars3 - Shows current directory, git state, return value of last command if it had an error code, number of background jobs, execution time of long-running commands, current python virtualenv.
  • aterminalstars32 - Displays Nodejs, NPM, Docker, Go, Python, Elixir and Ruby information in the prompt.
  • avilstars0 - Minimalist theme with git decorations.
  • avit-d2kstars15 - Based on the oh-my-zsh avit theme, with small changes.
  • avit-modstars0 - Modified version of oh-my-zsh's avit theme.
  • bananastars4 - Includes git status decorations and current directory.
  • banditstars3 - Another Powerline variant.
  • bar (anki-code)stars1 - Minimalist settings for p10kstars31.7k.
  • bar (xp-bar)stars1 - Includes username, host, pwd, git status decorations and 3x hour reminders to drink water.
  • barionstars1 - A fast compiled prompt with a compact git status overview. Reminiscent of powerline. Requires Crystal to build.
  • bashstars0 - Looks like the default bash prompt.
  • bashistars5 - Optimized for Ahmet Sülek's Flat UI Terminalstars620 theme and Pasquale D'Silva's Saturn Terminalstars73 theme.
  • bastardstars2 - Modified version of gitsterstars3 theme for ZIMstars2.8k.
  • bearablestars0 - Works well with dark terminal backgrounds.
  • bedbugsstars0 - Inspired by Agnoster, this multiline prompt includes git status information, background job count, working directory, user and hostname, Python virtualenv when present, colored return value of last command and root/user sigil.
  • beerstars3 - Inspired by cloud, but with beer icons.
  • benderstars6 - Fancy two-line prompt with git integration.
  • bgnosterstars0 - Agnoster variant with unicode symbols baked in.
  • biraSkullstars0 - Based on bira, includes root status and git status decorations.
  • biramestars3 - Based on bira.
  • birav2stars1 - Based on bira. Includes git, rvm and virtualenv status decorations.
  • bklynstars9 - Variant of Powerlevel9kstars13.4k with customizations applied.
  • blackrainstars6 - Another git-aware theme.
  • blazuxstars0 - Includes git status decoration and a smiley/sad face indicator of the last command's exit status.
  • blinks (max13ft)stars0 - Adds mercurial support to oh-my-zsh's blinkstars0 theme.
  • blinks-xfanstars2 - Based on the existing theme blinks.
  • blissstars18 - A delicate theme that injects color without overwhelming your workspace. Designed to be used with the bliss iTermstars12 color scheme and bliss dircolorsstars31. Includes git status decorations.
  • blokkzhstars5 - Theme based on oh-my-zsh's built in gnzh theme. Requires a font with unicode support.
  • bloxstars60 - A minimal and fast ZSH theme that shows you what you need. It consists of blocks: each block is shown inside a pair of [square brackets], and you can add blocks by simply creating a function.
  • bluehighstars2 - Minimal theme, displays git information.
  • bluelinesstars2 - Clear and blue theme.
  • bluostars1 - Colorful prompt segments reminiscent of bullet-trainstars2.7k or powerlevel10kstars31.7k. Includes git status decorations.
  • bogostars0 - Inspired by zetastars211. Includes git and ruby version decorations.
  • boomstars2 - Multiline theme, best on dark backgrounds.
  • bronzestars45 - A cross-shell customizable powerline-like prompt with icons written in go. Requires nerd-fontsstars38.8k.
  • brsstars2 - Displays the current song in the prompt with audtool.
  • bruhstars8 - Includes git status decorations.
  • bryce-robbyrussellstars0 - Inspired by the powerlinestars2.9k and robbyrussell themes.
  • bubblegumstars6 - Minimalist bright pink theme with a triangular glyph and your working directory, nothing else—leaving you with the cleanest shell possible.
  • bubblified (hohmannr)stars58 - Inspired by agnosterstars3.6k. Works best with nerdfontsstars38.8k.
  • bullet-trainstars2.7k - Inspired by the Powerline Vim plugin. It aims for simplicity, showing information only when it's relevant.
  • bunnyruni.minstars1 - @jopcode's bunnyrunistars13 ZSH theme, modified to just display time and directory.
  • bunnyrunistars13 - Simple, clean, and beautiful theme.
  • bureau-envstars1 - Modification of the Oh-My-Zsh Bureau theme that adds a Python virtual environment label to the left of the git block.
  • bureau-parrotstars0 - Based on bureau. Includes git decorations.
  • busterstars2 - Plays well with WSL2. Based loosely on Fox and Jonathan themes from oh-my-zsh.
  • cactusstars3 - Minimalist theme with git status decorations.
  • candy-lightstars2 - Light version of the candy theme.
  • cayun - Shows active Python version and git decorations in the prompt.
  • celestialorbstars1 - Powerline-inspired theme by @celestialorb. Includes git status decorations, Kubernetes cluster information (if any), current AWS profile and region, and active virtualenv.
  • cf-ps1stars0 - Displays the current foundation and organization and space of Cloud Foundry in your prompt.
  • ch4rli3stars0 - Lean and simple theme.
  • chaffeestars3 - Based on sorin. Shows the current active versions of Java, Scala, Go, Node, Python and Ruby.
  • chaotic-beefstars0 - A tiny and beautiful theme for Oh-My-Zsh without anything superfluous. Includes git status decorations.
  • chargedstars4 - A ZSH prompt optimized for the solarizedstars15.3k dark terminal theme.
  • chellostars0 - Works well on dark backgrounds. Depends on autojumpstars14.3k, zsh-autosuggestionsstars23.7k and zsh-syntax-highlightingstars15.5k.
  • chistars6 - A ZSH theme optimized for iTerm 2 users on macOS.
  • chillstars6 - Has decorations for the current working directory, last command exit status and git status.
  • chinipagestars0 - Minimalist theme that includes git decorations. Requires powerline-compatible fonts and the git-prompt plugin.
  • cinnabarstars2 - Shows timestamp, large line breaks, git branch and status.
  • claritystars6 - Designed for for simpleness and extensibility.
  • classyTouchstars52 - Minimal, clean theme with git support.
  • clean (akz92)stars7 - Minimalist ZSH theme.
  • clean (brandonRoehl)stars30 - A minimalist variant of purestars11.7k. Pure is not clean, clean is not pure.
  • clean (patr1ot)stars0 - Fork of the upstream clean with host information added.
  • cleanshstars3 - Minimalist, includes git, Ruby, node and Python version status decorations. Works with standard fonts.
  • clearancestars2 - minimalist theme with git, nix-shell and virtualenv status decorations.
  • cloudystars28 - Minimal cloudy ZSH theme.
  • cloverstars2 - Inspired by zetastars211 and purestars11.7k.
  • cobalt2stars1.1k - Wes Bos' Cobalt 2 theme for ZSH and iTerm 2.
  • cobalt2gitstars3 - Cobalt 2 theme with git extensions.
  • codemonkey-on-firestars0 - Inspired by bashistars5, includes a monkey and git information in your prompt.
  • coldarkstars1 - A blue-grey theme designed for reading comfort. Includes git decorations.
  • collonstars6 - Lightweight theme with git status decorations, cwd, time, host, exit status of last command. Does not require special fonts.
  • colorbira - Allows per-host prompt coloring, displays rvm, virtualenv and git information.
  • commonstars297 - A simple, clean and minimal prompt, displays current working directory, hostname, AWS vault role, background jobs, current SHA, exit code of last command, and git branch and status.
  • comxtohrstars3 - Brightly colored theme optimized for dark backgrounds.
  • cordialstars19 - Clean and effective ZSH theme with git and npm support.
  • craminstars7 - Minimal interface with support for github plugins, based on hyperzshstars504.
  • cryostars1 - A standalone clone of the original oh-my-zsh theme with date and time added.
  • crème fraîchestars0 - Works best with light terminal backgrounds, includes git and vi-mode status decorations.
  • cxzhstars0 - Works well on dark background, has git status decorations.
  • cypher-rubystars1 - Similar to cypher but includes the active Ruby version.
  • czshstars2 - ZSH with oh-my-zshstars151k and the agnosterstars3.6k theme in a container.
  • dailystars0 - Includes git and ssh status decorations.
  • daminostars0 - Minimal powerline-esque theme with git decorations.
  • daniloheracliostars0 Inspired by the robbyrussell theme. Has git and last command exit status decorations. Requires a nerdfont to render properly.
  • darkblood-modularstars1 - This version of the popular darkblood theme has been enhanced with a near complete rewrite enabling modularity and a few new features.
  • darksokustars0 - Based on the ys and astrostars97 themes.
  • dbernstars0 - Includes battery status and load average decorations.
  • delta (asavoy)stars1 - Minimal ZSH theme to reduce distractions. Includes an iTerm color settings file.
  • delta (dongri)stars0 - Another minimal theme with embedded git status.
  • delta-promptstars10 - A minimal ZSH prompt.
  • destinystars11 - A simple, configurable ZSH prompt with no dependencies. Destiny has been tested on Linux, macOS and iOS.
  • dexterstars2 - A theme with an emphasis on the right side (hence the name) of the terminal.
  • dinostars5 - Includes decorations for node, golang, flutter, lua, python & java, also includes git decorations. Requires nerdfonts.
  • diy-ysstars0 - Variant of ys without hostname or time.
  • dkniffinstars1 - Includes ruby version and git status.
  • dmxstars1 - Optimized for dark terminal windows.
  • doodleshellstars2 - Minimalist theme, includes git, terraform and aws status decorations.
  • dpstars1 - Low contrast theme that shows current git branch, if the repository is dirty and the value of $PYENV_VERSION.
  • dr4kk0nnys_v2stars0 - Works well on dark backgrounds, includes git status decorations.
  • draculastars214 - A dark theme for Atom, Alfred, Chrome DevTools, iTerm 2, Sublime Text, Textmate, Terminal.app, Vim, Xcode, and ZSH.
  • dragon (jeop10)stars1 - Inspired by kali linux. Includes git status and working directory decorations.
  • dragon (sabertaximi)stars11 - Minimalistic, includes git status information.
  • drkatstars2 - Reminiscent of Powerlinestars13.5k. Includes directory, git status, and hostname decorations.
  • droolscarstars2 - Powerlinestars13.5k variant.
  • dthemestars3 - Optimized for people using a solarized terminal color scheme and git. Works best with a unicode font.
  • ducksterstars4 - A fork of the gitster ZSH theme that's more ducky fresh.
  • duculastars33 - Inspired by Dracula project. Includes git status decorations, username and hostname abbreviations, virtual environment, current working directory, return status of last command and the time.
  • dustmodstars2 - Derived from the dst theme in oh-my-zsh.
  • dzhistars3 - Optimized for people using Nord. Includes git status decorations.
  • eckigstars0 - Minimalist theme with utf-8 icons. Includes git status decorations and a clock.
  • eggshaustedstars1 - A git-aware theme for people who are tired of getting errors.
  • elessarstars18 - A git-aware theme based on gitster. Requires a Powerline-compatible font.
  • elmstars0 - Includes git status, user@host, date, time and path decorators.
  • elsastars7 - Includes root status, pwd and git status decorations.
  • emojeerstars0 - Emoji flavored oh-my-zsh theme.
  • emojistars11 - Based on robbyrussell oh-my-zsh theme with the git prompt symbols replaced with emoji for better clarity.
  • emojirussellstars1 - Based on robbyrussell oh-my-zsh theme, with status decorations for current working directory, last command exit status, git branch and status.
  • endless-dogstars3 - oh-my-zsh-compatible theme that mimics grml-zsh-config.
  • enlightenmentstars6 - Includes decorations for git status, vi-mode indicator, and the time for last command to execute.
  • enormousstars1 - Takes up an enormous amount of space in the terminal.
  • erfanstars2 - Combination of the of af-magicstars7 and macovsky themes. Includes git and virtualenv status decorations.
  • erinerstars13 - A Zim fork of the Powerline-inspired agnosterstars3.6k prompt theme. Includes git status decorations.
  • eubwstars0 - A simple theme with git information.
  • eucalyptusstars1 - Simple one-line theme for minimalist vi-mode users inspired by agnosterstars3.6k and powerlevel9kstars13.4k. Includes git status indicator, vi-mode indicator, current directory and current path.
  • excessstars4 - Simple ZSH color theme.
  • ez-pzstars0 - Minimalist theme with git status decorations, inspired by bureaustars27.
  • fallstars25 - Minimalist theme with fall icons. Includes git status decorations.
  • fattyarrowstars0 - Minimal ZSH prompt that works better on dark backgrounds.
  • fdT2Kstars0- Based on agnosterstars3.6k, preset to include virtualenv, last command status, nvm, docker machine and git, hg and bzr status decorations.
  • feder - Clean, simple, compatible and meaningful. Tested on Linux, Unix and Windows under ANSI colors.
  • filthystars38 - A disgustingly clean ZSH prompt.
  • fishy-litestars2 - Fork of the original fishy theme in oh-my-zsh with much of the extraneous stuff cut out to improve load speeds. Includes a battery gauge and git status display that can be enabled on the right-hand side of the prompt.
  • fishy2stars3 - ZSH theme inspired by original fishy.
  • fluent-gitstars8 - Displays time of last command execution, error code, hostname, username, git status, kubernetes cluster and namespace, path and ssh connection status.
  • forerunnerstars5 - Custom setup for powerlevel9kstars13.4k. Includes git status decorations.
  • fortuitystars2 - Includes status of last command, git information and current directory.
  • frankstars0 - Frank keeps to the point, displaying information compactly but readably on a single line. Frank keeps to the facts and only tells you extra things when they are important.
  • friendly-fiestastars0 - Fork of terminal-party theme.
  • frisk-arrowstars1 - A theme based on the frisk oh-my-zsh-theme.
  • frisk-red - Red version of the frisk theme from oh-my-zsh.
  • fritzstars0 - Works well on dark backgrounds. Includes git status decorations.
  • frlostars1 - Uses your computer's hostname to come up with a (hopefully) unique three-color theme to display in your prompt, so you know at a glance which machine you're logged into.
  • funkyberlinstars2 - A colorful two-line theme with support for git and svn.
  • furiostars17 - Fork of the Cloud oh-my-zsh theme. with different colors and emojis.
  • furry-umbrellastars0 - Colorful theme, works better on a dark background.
  • gardenstars1 - Works better with a dark terminal background, includes git status decorations.
  • garrettstars156 - Prezto prompt with the information you need the moment you need it.
  • gawainestars3 - Nicola Racco's theme. Requires rvm & git plugins.
  • gbtstars517 - Go Bullet Train is a very customizable prompt builder inspired by Bullet Train that runs much faster. Includes many different status cars.
  • geometryHostInfostars1 - Adds host info to the geometrystars849 theme.
  • geometrystars849 - A minimal ZSH theme where any function can be added to the left prompt or (async) right prompt on the fly.
  • ghotistars0 - Mimics the fish-shell default prompt. Includes git decorations.
  • gideonstars0 - Inspired by avit, includes git decorations, IP address, host and path.
  • gimbostars2 - A variant of purepower with more features, a little eye candy and context-sensitive extra lines. Includes git status decorations, history number, username/hostname context, directory status, status of last command if it failed, and the Python virtualenv name if present.
  • gimmestars0 - A simplistic theme for ZSH with git integration. Inspired by the gitsomestars55 theme.
  • girazzstars0 - A modification to the gnzh theme which adds vi mode to the right prompt.
  • git-prompt (awgn)stars12 - A fast git prompt for bash, zsh and fish.
  • git-prompt (olivierverdier)stars1.6k - Displays information about the current git repository. In particular the branch name, difference with remote branch, number of files staged or changed, etc.
  • git-prompt-kitstars3 - A configurable set of components for creating feature rich, high performance Git-aware zsh prompts (aka themes) with minimal coding.
  • git-simplestars1 - Simple theme that includes detailed git status decorations.
  • gitsomestars55 - Super simple prompt with git info, optimized for the Flat Terminalstars620 color scheme.
  • gitstatusstars5 - Shows command and git status decorations.
  • gitster (shashankmehta) - When in a git repo, it shows the location from the git repository root folder. When not in a git repo, it shows the path relative to home, ~.
  • gitster (zimfw)stars3 - Zim fork of shashankmehta's gitster prompt theme
  • gitsterv2stars0 - Forked from the original gitster theme.
  • gk3000stars0 - Includes git status decorations and full path to current directory.
  • gndxstars45 - Includes git status, hostname, directory and last command exit status decorations.
  • gnrnzhstars1 - Customization of gnzh.zsh-theme from oh-my-zsh.
  • gopsstars9 - Fast powerline-like prompt. Includes git status, current directory, root status decorations.
  • graytstars3 - Simple yet informative theme that includes git decorations and the return status of the last command.
  • griffinstars0 - Minimalist, includes git status decorations.
  • gruvbox (hgaiser)stars4 - Sets colors from the gruvboxstars11.4k vim plugin.
  • gruvbox (sbugzu)stars78 - Based on agnoster, uses the same colors from the gruvboxstars11.4k vim plugin.
  • guezwhozstars30 - Minimalist, includes git status decorations.
  • guristars19 - A Simple and fast Oh-My-Zsh theme, based on Purestars11.7k's design.
  • halfeldstars4 - Minimalist theme with git decorations.
  • halilstars2 - Fork of oh-my-zsh's amuse theme.
  • hana-matchastars2 - A simple theme with the first character being 花(hana), the kanji for flower. This theme was inspired by a keycap set called DSA Hana. This pairs well with the hana atomstars0 theme. Includes git status decorations.
  • handystars1 - Colorful and lightweight theme. Shows root status, git status, current directory and user@hostname decorations.
  • hanpenstars0 - Shows git branch and status, last command exit code, last command execution time if more than ZSH_THEME_HANPEN_CMD_MAX_EXEC_TIME.
  • hapin - Based on oxide, includes git status decorations and current user/host information.
  • haribostars7 - Simple git status + timestamp in prompt.
  • hcompactstars1 - Displays time, OS (including distro if on Linux), directory and whether running as root.
  • heartstars5 - Heart themed prompt for light backgrounds.
  • hedroed-bureaustars0 - Based on bureau, with added git status decorations and npm status.
  • helbstars0 - Loosely based on Gentoo's old bash theme. Includes git information, return value of last command, and uses different username color and prompt char for users ($) and root (#).
  • hematitestars0 - Minimalist promot that tries to show only the status decorations that are actively useful at a given time.
  • hexagonstars2 - Minimalist zsh theme based on geometrystars849.
  • hfulldatestars1 - Displays time, date, OS (including distro if on Linux), directory and whether running as root.
  • hhktonystars0 - Inspired by robbyrussell theme + ssh connection status prompt.
  • hinastars1 - Written in golang, includes git status decoration and kubernetes context.
  • hip-fellowstars0 - Includes git status decorations and works with standard fonts.
  • hipstersmoothie-p9xstars9 - A variant of powerlevel9kstars13.4k.
  • homestars2 - Pretty and short one-line theme that makes you feel at home.
  • hometownstars3 - A feature rich, high performance git-aware ZSH theme with segments for the user, host, time, the current working directory and its parent, and detailed full Git status within a Git repo.
  • honukai-itermstars1.1k - Honukai theme and colors for oh-my-zsh and iTerm 2.
  • horizontalstars3 - Two line prompt with a horizontal separator.
  • hornixstars1 - Displays time & date, OS (including distro if on Linux), directory and whether running as root.
  • horse-shstars0 - A very minimal brown/red ZSH theme.
  • hub - Simple and clean, includes the return code of the last command executed.
  • hugstars3 - When you're working and need a hug. Includes git status.
  • humbledstars1 - A clean and humble theme with support for condaenv, virtualenv and git status decorations left aligned with the working directory in bold.
  • hyperstars37 - Designed to work with the hyper terminal theme, includes git status decorations.
  • hyperzshstars504 - Gives you a comprehensive overview of the branch you're working on and the status of your repository without cluttering your terminal.
  • iGeekstars0 - Modified iGeek theme. Works with macOS out-of the box, includes git status decorations.
  • iamskokstars3 - Works well on a dark background.
  • icestars1 - Very lightly modified bureaustars27 theme combined with bira.
  • iciclestars2 - Includes git status decorations, and whether running as root.
  • iggystars12 - A super happy awesome Powerline-style, git-aware prezto only theme.
  • iguanidaestars2 - Includes git, nvm and venv decorations.
