  • illusionstars3 - Includes username, current working directory, git status and last command status decorators.
  • illuvia-gitsterstars1 - Fork of ergenekonyigit/lambda-gitsterstars93 with spacing improvements and an updated icon. Includes git status information.
  • impstars27 - Based on zork and optimized for dark backgrounds.
  • infernusstars0 - Minimalist theme, better on dark backgrounds.
  • infoline - Clean theme that shows git status, background jobs, remote host, and other information.
  • intheloop-powerlinestars1 - An extension of the intheloop theme to use powerline fonts.
  • itgstars35 - itsthatguy's theme.
  • ivystars2 - Works well on dark backgrounds. Includes user@host, git status and time decorators. Based on the obraun theme.
  • jacobinstars0 - Based on refined and ys themes, includes git status decorations. Includes an optional iterm2 color scheme.
  • jakestars0 - Shows the time, the current directory, and git branch information including the branch name and a red + if the branch has un-pushed changes.
  • jamstars3 - Optimized for dark backgrounds, includes git status and rvm status.
  • jcstars1 - For dark terminal backgrounds, includes git status information.
  • jeromestars0 - Colorful theme based on the dieterstars0 theme, but with a yellow hostname. Includes git decorations.
  • jhleeemestars2 - Includes git and python virtualenv status decorations, user, pwd,time and system name.
  • jonstars1 - A simplified bira with the colors of robbyrussell.
  • josestars4 - Inspired by beer-themestars3, includes git status.
  • jpeglegstars1 - Similar to dark blood theme, includes timestamp and git decorations.
  • js-magicstars0 - A simplified take on af-magic. Includes current working directory and git status decorations.
  • judgedimstars0 - Minimalist prompt.
  • just-anotherstars0 - Just another theme, with hostname when you're sshed to another machine.
  • just-around-the-cornerstars0 - Counts down the days until Christmas. Includes git status decorations.
  • jwalterstars3 - Powerline-style theme with git, svn, npm, rvm and network awareness. Requires Powerline-compatible terminal font.
  • jyumppstars0 - Configuration file and installer for Powerlevel 10K.
  • kalistars18 - Includes git decorations.
  • karustars2 - Minimalist single line ZSH prompt.
  • keloranstars2 - Theme that includes a few features from other themes.
  • kentonstars2 - Optimized for dark backgrounds, includes git status information.
  • kevinstars2 - Colorful theme, includes iTerm 2 color schemes.
  • kgzshstars0 - Includes git status deorations, works well on darker backgrounds.
  • kidostars5 - Based on ys and robbyrussell themes. Includes decorators for the exit code of the last command run, python virtualenv and VCS status.
  • kimwzstars9 - Minimal theme.
  • kinda-fishystars5 - Based on Fishy theme, but shows full paths instead of abbreviated directories and only shows user@machine in ssh sessions and docker containers.
  • kirkdawsonstars0 - Powerline-inspired. Includes prompt decorations for git status, last command exit status, user@hostname, working directory and whether the user is running as root.
  • kissstars42 - Simple theme for oh-my-zsh, VSCode, iTerm2, Neovim, and RStudio. Includes git status decorations.
  • kketchamstars0 - Theme with nifty colors on the git info.
  • korittgstars0 - Minimalistic but informative. Includes decorations for git status, current directory and the kubectl context and namespace.
  • kotestars1 - Best for dark backgrounds. Includes git status decorations.
  • kotterstepstars0 - Two line theme designed for dark terminals, has git decorations.
  • krak3nstars1 - Shows golang version and the current git branch.
  • krakenstars1 - A dark theme for ZSH.
  • kubestars0 - Based on macos-terminal, includes kubectl context. Has time, directory, and git status decorations.
  • kumavisstars0 - Agnoster fork optimized for solarized terminals. Requires powerline-compatible font.
  • kwstars1 - Colorful theme with git and hg status information, ability to add host-specific colors to hostname.
  • kyuustars1 - A simple theme with the first character being 九(kyuu), the number 9. The primary color is blue with a magenta accent. Includes git status decorations.
  • lagunestars1 - A minimal ZSH theme.
  • lambda (halfo)stars454 - A ZSH theme optimized for git users who use unicode-compatible fonts and terminal applications.
  • lambda-blazinggitstars0 - Includes blazing fast, detailed git information. Requires Nerd Fonts and the gitstatusstars1.4k plugin.
  • lambda-gitsterstars93 - Minimalist prompt that includes git information.
  • lambda-minimalstars4 - Simple theme based on lambda with git status and virtualenv information.
  • lambda-modstars454 - A simple ZSH theme, optimized for git usage.
  • lambda-pstars0 - Inspired by the lambda modstars454 and Lambda Vstars2 themes. Includes git status decorations.
  • lambda-vstars2 - A combination of the Lambda and Fishy themes, includes git status decorations.
  • lambda-zenstars2 - inspired by lambda mod themestars454 with graphical git status decorations.
  • lambderstars0 - Includes git status decorations, works best with a dark terminal theme.
  • laniksjstars0 - Works best on a dark background. Based on the great ys theme and Honukai ZSH Themestars1.1k. Shows root status and git status decorations.
  • lazyprodigystars1 - Optimized for dark terminals, has variants for local and remote systems.
  • leafiastars1 - Leafy prezto theme that shows git status information.
  • leanstars148 - Inspired by purestars11.7k. Includes git status and background job decorations.
  • lemonstars1 - Many beautiful colors for you to enjoy. done with care and patience. Includes git status and ruby version decorations.
  • leonstars0 - Works well on light background. Includes git status, time, username@host, working directory and last command exit status decorations.
  • leveragestars1 - Based on minimal, uses colors, and an extra ¬ character, to better distinguish the command line prompt from your output.
  • lewisstars0 - Black, white and red theme. Shows git status information.
  • lightbulbstars4 - Includes decorations for kernel, OS version, uptime and git.
  • lighthausstars5 - A prompt that compliments the Lighthausstars22 theme. Shows git information, github/gitlab logo and shows changes as and when they occur.
  • lilastars0 - Minimalist theme, best on a dark terminal background.
  • lilithstars0 - Modification of gallifrey and hyperzshstars504.
  • limestars15 - Simple and easily customizable ZSH theme.
  • limpidestars0 - Modified version of miloshadzic theme which displays parent and current directory.
  • linuxerstars2 - Inspired by Yaris Alex Gutierrez's classyTouchstars52, Yad Smood's ys, and the Bureaustars27 theme.
  • linuxerostars0 - Minimalist. Includes decorations for root status, current directory, git status, current ruby rvm environment and current python virtualenv.
  • liquidpromptstars4.2k - A full-featured & carefully designed adaptive prompt with useful information when you need it. It shows you what you need when you need it. You will notice what changes when it changes, saving time and frustration.
  • lishstars0 - A casual theme. No roughness, just smooth. Includes git, user@host, last command exit status, current directory, current time and root status decorators.
  • liverstars0 - Colorful, includes git status, user, host, current and relative path to the current repository root decorations.
  • llamastars6 - Minimalist theme used by discerning llamas.
  • logicostars3 - Has git decorations. Shows remote status and indicator for vi-mode.
  • lone-star - Texas-themed theme based on Sindre Sorhus' pure theme.
  • longsilvernstars1 - Includes git and compact pwd decorations.
  • lorondstars0 - Compact version of af-magic. Includes git status, works with standard fonts.
  • ludwigwsstars0 - Variant of lambda-mod theme. Has git decorations, requires a powerline-compatible terminal font.
  • lukestars0 - Includes git decorations. Based on the frisk oh-my-zsh theme.
  • lukerandall-extendedstars1 - Extended version of the lukerandall theme. Includes decorations for git status and the status of the last command run.
  • lunachar - Minimalist theme.
  • macosstars11 - Includes git status decorations.
  • madstars0 - Includes git status and last command execution time decorations.
  • magicmacestars2 - Inspired by xero's ZSH prompt and eriner's promptstars13. Includes status codes for active python venv, exit status of last command, shortened working directory, git status decorations.
  • magicostars0 - IOsonoTAN's magico theme.
  • maivanastars1 - Includes kubectl context, git status decorations.
  • materialshellstars805 - A material design theme for your shell with a good contrast and color pops at the important parts. Designed to be easy on the eyes.
  • matrixstars7 - Variant of powerlevel9kstars13.4k styled to look like something in the Matrix movie trilogy. Includes git status decorations.
  • matterstars1 - Shows git status, AWS vault role, background jobs, exit code of last command & hostname.
  • maustars2 - A ZSH theme with a cat twist. Includes git status decorations. Based on the kphoen and smt themes.
  • mbolisstars0 - Includes git decorations, changes prompt color if root user, active jobs, and jenvstars4.5k integration.
  • mdministars2 - Includes git and ssh status decorations.
  • megapromptstars4 - A maximalist prompt including keyboard mode, ownership info, and other contextual info, with λ as the prompt character. Requires the hooksstars41 plugin.
  • metalmajorstars0 - Includes git status decorations, shows exit code of last command if nonzero.
  • mexassistars1 - Checks the /sys/class/power_supply folders to determine if the system is installed on a laptop or desktop machine. Reads the battery percentage grepping acpi command and displays it in the prompt. Includes git decorations.
  • mh-fzjstars1 - Includes rvm and git status decorations.
  • michaelpassstars1 - POSIX-friendly cross-platform alanpeabody mod w/ convenient timestamps and full git/ruby support.
  • midinstars0 - Works well on dark terminal background, includes git status decorations.
  • mike-was-herestars0 - Minimalist, includes git status decorations.
  • milightstars0 - Minimal ZSH prompt with git status display, works best with dark terminal backgrounds.
  • minstars10 - A minimalistic ZSH prompt.
  • mindful-spacestars2 - ZSH theme with space in mind.
  • mini-simplestars1 - Minimalist. Includes vcs status decorations.
  • minima (Brolly0204)stars1 - Includes git, node, golang, yarn, php, docker and python status decorations.
  • minima (ednikolenko)stars2 - A minimal ZSH theme with git, docker, go, node, npm, python and other indicators. Uses unicode characters for some markers.
  • minimal (subnixr)stars236 - Minimal yet feature-rich theme.
  • minimal-improvedstars18 - Theme for dark terminals, includes git decorations in the right-side prompt.
  • minimal2stars11 - A minimal and extensible ZSH theme. Forked from subnixr's originalstars236 and adapted for Zimfwstars2.8k.
  • minimalxstars1 - Inspired by kolo theme from oh-my-zsh.
  • mirastars0 - A modified bira with time info and a simplified start prompt.
  • miragestars0 - Includes prompt decorations for git status, last command exit code, whether sudo timestamp file is present and current active Python virtual environment.
  • miramarestars1 - Includes git status decorations. Works best with Deepin Terminal.
  • misastars1 - Misalabs' ZSH theme.
  • mixedstars0 - Optimized for dark backgrounds.
  • mnmlstars4 - Minimal theme with git status decorations.
  • mochi2stars5 - Minimalist theme. Includes git and hg status decorations.
  • mochistars5 - Simple theme, designed to resemble rust main function. Includes git and hg status decorations.
  • modernostars1 - A simple and modern ZSH theme inspired by the robbyrussell theme from Oh-My-ZSH. Includes git status decorations.
  • modestystars0 - A clean and modest ZSH theme with condaenv, virtualenv and git status decorations displayed neatly right aligned.
  • molokai-powerlinestars9 - Based on agnoster.
  • momoyostars2 - Reminiscent of powerline. Includes decorations for git status, username, and working directory.
  • moonlinestars16 - Minimal but easily extensible prompt.
  • mouxstars0 - Works well with a dark terminal background, includes git decorations in RPROMPT.
  • multi-shell-repo-promptstars11 - Provides useful information (in your prompt) about the repository that you are in. It currently works for Git and Mercurial, under ZSH as well as bash.
  • multilinestars20 - Powerline-esque theme based on agnosterstars3.6k.
  • muslimstars6 - A simple minimal ZSH prompt theme.
  • musystars0 - Inspured by muse theme. Includes git status decorations.
  • my-hl2stars0 - Includes virtualenv, git status and directory decorations. Based on omz's half-life theme.
  • myzshstars0 - Maxime Garcia's myzsh theme.
  • mztstars1 - Sets up LS_COLORS, colorizes diff and includes git status and current working directory decorations.
  • nanofish - Adds fish-style directory prompt to nanotech theme.
  • nbrylevvstars0 - Minimalist theme with text git status decorations.
  • nctustars4 - Lightweight theme with an emphasis on speed. Includes git status decorations.
  • neewbiestars0 - Minimal theme with git decorations. Based on robbyrussell.
  • neon-potatostars0 - Colorful and minimalist theme. Includes git decorations.
  • neonstars13 - A pretty and minimal ZSH theme with git decorations.
  • nerdish - A prompt theme for ZSH with Nerd Fonts.
  • nescalantestars0 - Optimized for dark terminal backgrounds, includes git decorations.
  • neurosimplestars0 - Includes git decorations and vi-mode indicator.
  • newtstars10 - Fat & fast theme – beautiful inside and out, styled segments done right. Extremely customizable, includes git, username, execution time, directory, background jobs and edit mode decorations.
  • newtonstars0 - Includes git status and external IP address decorations.
  • nextbikestars4 - A very basic theme which just features an macOS bike icon.
  • nidoranarionstars0 - Colorful, shows git status decorations.
  • nikitakotstars0 - Small and simple oh-my-zsh theme. Shows current directory and 2 directories behind, git and nodejs status decorations.
  • ningxiastars0 - Based on af-magic.
  • nknustars0 - A simple oh-my-zsh theme.
  • nmaxcomstars2 - Minimalist ZSH theme with git status decorations.
  • nodestars66 - oh-my-zsh's node theme, broken out to make it easier to use with other plugin managers.
  • nodeysstars37 - Based on the ys theme, with added NodeJS version (from NVM plugin).
  • noonstars0 - Has light and dark variants, shows git information.
  • nordstars7 - Includes git status decorations and displays the active conda environment.
  • normaniusstars0 - Derived from bira.
  • nothingstars29 - Lightning fast and really simple because it has almost nothing in it.
  • noxstars10 - Dark theme, displays the current working directory and git status.
  • nunorcstars0 - Minimalist theme, works well on dark backgrounds. Includes git, mercurial and svn satus decorations.
  • nuqlezshstars1 - A simple theme for prezto and oh-my-zsh.
  • nutsstars4 - Minimalist theme, includes git status decorations and time.
  • oblongstars1 - Simple bash-inspired theme based on gitster and basher. Includes status decorations to show if user is root, the exit status of last command run, git branch and its clean/dirty status.
  • odiestars0 - Works well on a dark background. Includes git status, python virtualenv and vi-mode status decorations.
  • odinstars72 - Odin is a git-flavored ZSH theme.
  • oh-flowersstars1 - Multiline theme with git decorations.
  • oh-my-gitstars3.5k - An opinionated prompt for bash and ZSH.
  • oh-my-posh - Not ZSH-specific, but very nice and works with ZSH. Allows you to use the same configuration for prompts in all shells.
  • oh-my-viastars31 - Theme for ZSH which mainly forks the historical theme used on VIA servers.
  • ohmypcstars2 - Works well with dark terminal windows. Includes git decorations.
  • omstars1 - Minimal theme, works with dark backgrounds, includes git status decorations.
  • omsztstars2 - Minimalist theme with git decorations.
  • omusestars1 - Based on Oh-My-ZSH's amuse. Has decorations for git status, time, absolute pwd, RAM usage, time used by last command, and last command exit status.
  • owistars0 - Minimalist theme with git status decorations.
  • owiewestsidestars1 - Includes git status and virtualenv information.
  • oxide - A Minimalistic and Dark ZSH theme.
  • ozonostars9 🌏 OZ0NO - Let's Breathe a clean ZSH.
  • p9k-theme-pastelstars3 - A theme for the powerlevel10kstars31.7k prompt that puts an emphasis on simplcity while still getting important information across.
  • padstars4 - A concise and colorful oh-my-zsh theme.
  • pagestars2 - A simple theme with VCS support. The prompt shows 1 level of the current working directory, branch, and a color coded curved fat arrow.
  • palenight (jenssegers)stars10 - Allows display of host information, includes git branch decoration.
  • palenight (rhklite)stars0 - Shows detailed git status information with icons in the prompt.
  • pandastars0 - Includes git and root status decorations. Best on a dark background.
  • papercolorstars7 - Color scheme for ZSH, vim and tmux. Includes git status decorations.
  • passionstars132 - Includes git status decorations, command run time in milliseconds. Requires coreutils on macOS.
  • pastelstars6 - A ZSH theme inspired by sugar-freestars3. Includes git decorations.
  • pecodezstars0 - Optimized for dark terminals. Has decorators for snyk version, node version, AWS profile, kubernetes context and git status.
  • persistars3 - Includes git decorations. Works with both light and dark backgrounds.
  • phalanxstars0 - Minimal theme in the spirit of the robbyrussell and Pure Shell themes.
  • phi φstars13 - A clean and simple theme for ZSH inspired and forked from the Lambda (Mod) ZSHstars454 theme.
  • pistars92 - A minimalist theme with git status decorations.
  • piboystars1 - A simple and elegant multi-line theme for ZSH. Includes a colourized timestamp, git & syntax highlighting, and elevated root theme.
  • plain-uistars0 - Minimalist, but includes git status decorations.
  • plainstars0 - A plain and simple theme for ZSH which shows basic git information.
  • planetstars0 - A slimmed down version of steef from oh-my-zshstars151k.
  • planktonstars1 - Simple, no-frills theme.
  • plantyhoestars1 - Minimalist theme based on a love of plants and apples. Includes git status decorations.
  • platypusstars1 - Platypus is a simple and convenient theme for oh-my-zsh used by Frédéric de Villamil.
  • pointerstars1 - Shows working directory, the return status of the last command, and git current branch.
  • polyglotstars142 - a dynamic prompt for zsh, bash, ksh93, mksh, pdksh, dash, and busybox ash that uses basic ASCII symbols (and color, when possible) to show username, whether it is a local or remote ssh sesssion, abbreviated path, git branch and status, exit status of last command if non-zero, any virtual environment created with virtualenv, venv, pipenv, poetry, or conda.
  • ponchostars3 - RDM's basic oh-my-zsh custom theme.
  • poor-programmerstars0 - Programmer's theme with git status, ruby version and project path.
  • powerbashstars1 - Works well with dark terminal backgrounds, includes git status decorations.
  • powerlessstars63 - Tiny & simple pure ZSH prompt inspired by powerline.
  • powerlevel10kstars31.7k - A fast reimplementation of powerlevel9kstars13.4k ZSH theme. Can be used as a drop-in replacement for powerlevel9k, when given the same configuration options it will generate the same prompt, only faster.
  • powerlevel9kstars13.4k - Powerlevel9k is a theme for ZSH which uses Powerline Fontsstars24k. It can be used with vanilla ZSH or ZSH frameworks such as Oh-My-Zshstars151k, Preztostars13k, Antigenstars7.3k, and many others.
  • powerlevelHipstersmoothiestars9 - Add-on for powerlevel9kstars13.4k.
  • powerline (brucehsu)stars10 - A two-line version of powerline: one for information, one for input.
  • powerline (jeremy)stars1.1k - Another take on a powerline theme. Nicely configurable, but requires at least a 256 color-capable terminal with a powerline-compatible terminal font.
  • powerline (syui)stars0 - A git aware powerline theme.
  • powerline-cutestars28 - Based on bullet-trainstars2.7k.
  • powerline-gostars2.5k - A beautiful and useful low-latency prompt, written in golang. Includes git and hg status decorations, exit status of the last command run, current Python virtualenv, whether you're in a nix shell, and is easy to extend.
  • powerline-hsstars118 - A Powerlinestars13.5k clone written in Haskell. It is significantly faster than the original implementation, and makes the shell noticeably more responsive.
  • powerline-shell (b-ryan)stars5.9k - Beautiful and useful prompt generator for Bash, ZSH, Fish, and tcsh. Includes git, svn, fossil and hg decorations, Python virtualenv information, and last command exit status.
  • powerline-shell (banga)stars5.9k - A powerlinestars2.9k-like prompt for Bash, ZSH and Fish. Shows important details about git/svn/hg/fossil branch and is easy to customize/extend.
  • powerline-trainstars4 - A powerline variant.
  • powerlinestars123 - A Powerlinestars2.9k-like prompt, based on powerline-bashstars15. Displays virtualenv, git status information and the exit code of the last command run.
  • powermorestars0 - Forked from powerlessstars63. Simple prompt that shows git status and current directory.
  • powerzeeshstars0 - A Powerline based ZSH theme. It aims for simplicity, showing information only when it's relevant, optimized for speed and look. Inspired by Agnosterstars3.6k and Powerlinestars1.1k.
  • prestars47 - A collection of themes for Sublime Text, Terminal, iTerm 2 and ZSH.
  • predawn-shellstars51 - Theme optimized for dark terminal themes.
  • prezto-cloud-promptstars1 - Prezto port of oh-my-zsh's cloud prompt.
  • prezto-lambdastars0 - Lambda theme (for prezto).
  • prezto_powerlinestars117 - Powerline for prezto. Shows git information, RVM version.
  • probestars4 - Includes git status decorations.
  • prompt-powerlinestars49 - A fairly heavyweight ZSH prompt, based on the powerline font from the popular eponymous vim plugin, which works well for a dark background.
  • promptstars0 - A lightweight prompt consistent across sh, dash, ash, zsh, and pwsh. Includes git status decorations.
  • prompt_j2stars0 - Has a dynamic exit status indicator, can change to two lines dynamically to display context.
  • promptusstars10 - Simple, minimalist and configurable shell prompt program in C which can be used to make your prompt the same on any shell. Includes exit code and working directory decorations.
  • prontostars0 - Simple and fast theme with git decorations and timing information.
  • ps1.pystars5 - Has git status, truncated directory, chroot and virtualenv prompt decorations.
  • pskfyistars0 - Based on lambda. Themed for ubuntu but easily tweaked.
  • punctualstars49 - Easily customizable, influenced by spaceshipstars17.5k.
  • purestars11.7k - A pretty, minimal and fast ZSH prompt. Includes git status decorations, prompt turns red if last command failed, username and host decorations when in a remote session or container, and current folder and command when a process is running.
  • purify (banminkyoz)stars273 - A simple, fast & cool prompt.
  • purify (kyoz)stars273 - A clean and vibrant theme, best on dark backgrounds. Includes git status decorations.
  • pursstars226 - A fast purestars11.7k-inspired prompt written in Rust.
  • pusteltostars0 - Colorful theme inspired by the Spaceshipstars17.5k theme, includes git decorations.
  • qi3ber2stars0 - A dark multiline theme. Includes git, load average and exit code of last command decorators.
  • qoomonstars2 - Optimized for dark backgrounds, includes git information. Theme repo includes iTerm 2 and Terminal color settings.
  • r3nic1estars0 - Agnosterstars3.6k variant with battery status, git/hg status, time, kubernetes context and namespace, non-zero exit code of last command and date decorations. Requires Powerline font.
  • racotecnicstars10 - Based on af-magic and posh-git.
  • radiumstars3 - Designed for dark terminals, (works best with Solarizedstars15.3k iTerm 2 theme) (prezto).
  • rafikistars50 - Adds emojis to your ZSH terminal.
  • ramielstars0 - Fork of the nodestars66.
  • random-emoji-robbyrussellstars1 - Based on random-emoji and robbyrussell themes.
  • random-emoji - Random emoji.
  • ranger-zoxidestars4 - Adds zoxidestars7.9k support to the rangerstars12.2k console file manager.
  • raspberryshstars0 - Includes git, python, time, current host and path decorations.
  • raytekstars0 - Simple and colorful theme with git status decorations.
  • razstars2 - Minimal prompt, includes git status decorations.
  • rbstars3 - Powerline-styled ZSH theme based on Agnoster, optimized for git and solarized terminals. Requires a Powerline-compatible font.
  • rbjorklinstars0 - Optimized for solarized terminal color schemes, includes git status decorations.
  • redlinestars1 - Minimalist theme. Includes git status, time, user.
  • reggaestars0 - Compresses a lot of information into the prompt with color-coded status decorations.
  • remiiistars7 - Based on Agnosterstars3.6k, optimized for solarizedstars15.3k terminal themes.
  • rhostars0 - Minimalist theme.
  • riverstars3 - Dark theme with git information.
  • robbyolivierstars1 - Based on ideas from the the robbyrussell theme and the project zsh-git-promptstars1.6k.
  • robbyrussell-WIPstars7 - Decorates the robbyrussell theme with output to indicate a WIP commit.
  • robbyrussell-fullpathstars1 - The original robbyrussell with a fullpath in the prompt.
  • rocketstars1 - Minimalist theme, includes git and hg status decoration.
  • rougaroustars2 - A dark theme.
  • roundystars17 - fast, cute and roundy theme. Includes git decorations. Requires nerd fonts and a unicode-capable terminal application.
  • rozstars0 - Minimalist. Includes git status decorations, best on a darker background.
  • rsstars0 - Includes git decorations. Requires unicode capable terminal.
  • rufusstars0 - Optimized for dark backgrounds.
  • rummikstars0 - @rummik's theme. Supports psmin, and git status information in the prompt.
  • russtonestars2 - Inspired by purestars11.7k and sorinstars13k. Includes git status decorations.
  • rynerstars1 - Colorful theme, includes git decorations and the current directory.
  • s1ck94stars3 - Fork of the (first deprecated, now extinct) minimal prompt by S1cK94. Shows whether user is root, background job status, vi-mode, exit status of last command, and git status decorations.
  • s7cstars0 - Works well with dark backgrounds. Includes git status decorations.
  • saraivastars4 - Includes git status decorations, works well on a dark terminal background.
  • saturnstars5 - A soft & minimalistic prompt for those who love space and want to have a bit of it on their terminal, featuring cool emojis & highly customizable prompt elements (such as icons, colors, time format, and more).
  • schminitz - Shows if vim is running in the background when using :sh command.
  • scythestars0 - Powerline-reminiscent theme. Includes git, last command exit status and directory decorations.
  • sdkmanstars48 - Add tab completions for sdkman.
  • seashellstars25 - Minimal theme with sea-inspired emoji decorations. Includes git status decorations.
  • seekerstars47 - This theme uses many special unicode characters to be fancy, but it may cause some problems without well supported fonts.
  • seltzerstars0 - Inspired by the dieter theme, uses color-coding to provide information.
  • sepshellstars16 - Clean and minimal ZSH theme based on the old lost taybalt theme, with git bisecting/merging/rebasing modes and configurable prompt symbols.
  • seriousstars0 - Includes command exit status and git status decorations.
  • sfzstars1 - An evolution of lean prompt which itself is a rewrite of pure.
  • shadowstars0 - Includes git status, directory, host name, username and time decorations.
  • shayanstars4 - Simple theme with git status decorations.
  • shelbystars166 - Fast, lightweight and minimal prompt written in pure golang. Includes decorations for last command exit status, git status and the current working directory.
  • shichistars0 - A simple theme with the first character being 七(shichi/nana), the number 7. The primary color is red with a yellow accent. Includes git status decorations.
  • shinistars0 - A tiny theme that just shouts out small. Includes directory, username, hostname, time and git decorations.
  • shirnschallstars0 - Includes git status and user@hostname decorations.
  • shocmstars0 - Forked from sixlivestars4. Has git decorations.
  • short-ysstars0 - Based on the ys theme. Includes git and hg status decorations.
  • shrikantstars0 - Includes git decorations.
  • shtr0mstars0 - Includes git status decorations.
  • siegertsstars0 - Includes git status decorations in right prompt.
  • silverstars374 - A cross-shell customizable powerline-like prompt heavily inspired by Agnosterstars3.6k. A faster rust port of bronzestars45. Requires Nerd Fontsstars38.8k. Very configurable, includes git status decorations.
  • simpaltstars1 - An information-rich small-footprint theme for ZSH based on Agnosterstars3.6k.
  • simple (daopengz)stars0 - Works well with both light and dark terminal themes. Includes vcs, username and path decorations.
  • simple (pavdmyt)stars3 - Minimalist theme based on robbyrussel that embeds git status information in iTerm's window title bar instead of using space in the prompt.
  • simple (savecoders)stars5 - Simple and minimalist theme with git, username and execution status decorations.
  • simple (tourcoder)stars0 - Minimalist prompt, includes git status decorations.
  • simple (yhiraki)stars0 - Minimal prompt, doesn't require special fonts.
  • simple-agnosterstars3 - Powerline-inspired simple theme with git decorations.
  • simple-gitstars0 - Minimalist theme inspired by gitstatusstars5. Includes git decorations.
  • simple-yet-beautifulstars0 - Minimalist theme. Includes git status and user@host prompt decorations.
  • simplezshstars0 - Minimal theme with git info display.
  • sinonstars0 - k-kinzal's sinon theme. Includes git status decorations.
  • sitstars0 - Minimalist theme with git, command exit status and path decorations.
  • sixlivestars4 - This theme has a unique directory listing. When inside a git project, the directory display is scoped to the current repository root.
  • sk9stars0 - Skeiter9's ZSH theme.
  • skeletor-syntaxstars16 - Theme collection for Atom, Prism and ZSH inspired by Skeletor from He-Man and the Masters of the Universe.
  • skullstars10 - Includes git status, python virtual environment and ruby rvm status decorations.
  • sleeplessmindstars1 - ZSH theme inspired by gitster and odinstars72.
  • slickstars20 - Inspired by the purestars11.7k, pursstars226 and zsh-efgit-promptstars7. Requires cargo for installation.
  • slimlinestars48 - Minimal, fast and elegant ZSH prompt. Displays the right information at the right time.
  • smstars14 A Simplist & Minimalist theme for your favorite terminal. Includes git status decorations.
  • small-terminal-diystars0 - A variant of the ys theme in oh-my-zshstars151k.
  • smileystars6 - A prompt with happy and sad faces.
  • sobolestars115 - A minimalistic ZSH theme inspired by the old-fashioned hobbies. No verbose gimmicks, no emoji, no fidget spinners, and no other visual noise. Has both light and dark modes.
  • solarized-powerline (KuoE0)stars46 - Solarized powerline variant.
  • solarized-powerline (houjunchen)stars11 - Solarized powerline-style theme for ZSH.
  • solarizshstars4 - Color fix for robbyrussell's oh-my-zsh theme to work with solarizedstars15.3k terminals.
  • spowerline - Written in scala, inspired by Agnosterstars3.6k, tmux powerline, vim powerline and the vim status plugin.
  • spyrhoostars2 - Includes time, git and current directory decorations.
  • squanchy - Minimalist theme. Includes git, node and rbenv status decorations.
  • ssfpromptstars0 - Simple, slim, fast. Includes ssh, virtualenv and vcs decorations.
  • staplesstars3 - Based on bureau, displays user@host if connected through SSH.
  • starboystars0 - A simple ZSH theme.
  • starship - Minimal, fast, extremely customizable.
  • statuslinestars64 - A responsive ZSH theme that provides informational segments when you need them.
  • steef (zimfw)stars3 - A customizable version of steeef's theme.
  • steeplestars0 - Minimalist theme with git status decorations.
  • stellachar - Minimal, pastels.
  • sublimestars0 - A sublime, clean, minimalistic ZSH theme with git status decorations.
  • sugar-freestars3 - Based on the Purestars11.7k and Candy themes.
  • sukeeshstars0 - Includes git status decorations. Works better on dark terminal backgrounds.
  • sulfuriumstars0 - The official ZSH theme of sulfuriumOS.
  • sunrise-rubystars0 - Similar to sunrise but includes the active Ruby version.
  • superkolostars2 - Add date and return status to the kolo theme.
  • susistars10 - Includes git status decorations and an accompanying iTerm2 color scheme.
  • svsstars0 - Clean and distraction free theme with git status and current path decorations.
  • systars2 - Based on ys, includes git status decorations.
  • t2erstars0 - Minimalist theme with git decorations.
  • tabafstars3 - Minimal ZSH theme optimized for dark backgrounds.
  • tepig-ysstars25 - Includes git status decorations and conda/virtualenv status.
  • termuxstars1 - Minimalist theme.
  • termuxerstars13 - Theme inspired by Agnosterstars3.6k and linuxer.
  • the-time-lordstars0 - A theme based on gallifrey.
  • theme-linestars12 - Colorful theme with git status.
  • theta-asyncstars0 - Async version of thetastars9. Includes vcs status information.
  • thetastars9 - Includes git and hg status decorations. Also has java, python, ruby, node, go and elixir version information.
  • thetostars8 - Simplistic theme. Needs Nerd Fonts, includes vi-mode status and git decorations.
  • thetravelerstars2 - Inspired by theunraveler, uses symbols to display git status.
  • thnikkstars1 - A minimal version of the spaceshipstars17.5k theme.
  • thyme (kawamurakazushi)stars0 - Simple theme with git status decorations.
  • toledostars6 - Quick minimalist theme with git status decorations.
  • tonni4stars0 - Includes time and git status decorators.
  • topanstars1 - Includes git information; best on dark backgrounds.
  • tq - Displays git status, time, requires a Powerline font.
  • trafficstars1 - A dark theme for ZSH.
  • trajanstars1 - A dark theme for ZSH.
  • trinitystars1 - A simple theme based on geometrystars849. Includes git decorations.
  • tronstars0 - Includes git status, working directory, time, user@host and return status of last command decorations.
  • tursstars0 - Fast, minimal Pursstars226-inspired prompt.
  • tvlinestars2 - Derived from the agnoster theme, adds powerline font enhancements.
  • twilightstars2 - Minimalist, but includes last command exit status, git status and user@hostname decorations.
  • type0stars0 - Inspired by classyTouchstars52 by yarisgutierrez. Includes git decorations.
  • typewrittenstars740 - Minimal and informative theme that leaves room for what's important. Does asynchronous git decoration updates for speed.
  • ubunlystars8 - Mimics the Kali Linux console. Note - this theme also rebinds a lot of keys and sets a bunch of ZSH options that themes should leave alone.
  • ubuntu-ishstars0 - Mimics the default Debian/Ubuntu bash prompt.
  • ubuntu-with-vitaminsstars0 - Mimics the default Ubuntu prompt, but with git decorations.
  • ubuntustars0 - Minimal theme, includes git status decorations.
  • unit-1stars0 - Minimalist theme with ITWTB colors.
  • vananstars0 - Minimalist theme with git information for dark terminals.
  • vercelstars166 - Minimalist theme with git status decorations.
  • vertepommesstars0 - Based on ys. Includes vcs status, username and current directory decorations.
  • vitesse - Inspired by VS Code's Vitessestars255 theme. Includes git status decorations.
  • vulcanstars0 - Minimal theme reminiscent of the default bash theme. Includes git decorations.
  • wadestars5 - Mashup of the popular ZSH themes Agnoster and Fishy, with some visual tweaks.
  • wang-itermstars5 - Based on the 0532 theme.
  • whalestars2 - Fast reimplementation of the whale theme.
  • whalesstars0 - Includes decorators for git status, java version, last command return status, and directory.
  • wild-cherrystars453 - A fairy-tale inspired theme for ZSH, iTerm 2, Sublime, Atom, & Mou.
  • wkentarostars1 - A simple theme for Python users. Includes virtualenv and git status decorators.
  • work-linestars5 - Theme with nice emojis.
  • workbenchstars4 - Includes git status decorations, working directory, exit status of last command and current virtualenv.
  • wynwynstars0 - A theme that aims to show you the information you need when you need it. wynwyn takes inspiration from the default theme avit and the excellent Spaceship promptstars17.5k.
  • xavistars0 - Modified version of the gnzh theme with emoji decorations for git status and current directory.
  • xlk-simplestars1 - Simple theme with git decorations.
  • xmstars0 - Theme for dark terminals. Has git decorations.
  • xorstars1 - Self described as minimalistic and 'feature-poor', includes git decorations.
  • xremixstars1 - An oh-my-zsh shell theme based on the Jreese theme plugin.
  • xris47stars0 - Fast, simple and streamlined theme. Works best with tmux and vim-airlinestars16.8k.
  • yairshefistars0 - Minimal theme with line separated prompts. Based on the robbyrussell theme.
  • yazptstars5 - A clean, fast, good-looking ZSH prompt theme that thoughtfully incorporates Git/Subversion/TFVC status info, integrates with popular plugin managers like Oh My Zsh, and is straightforward to customize and extend.
  • yechenstars0 - Minimalist theme with git status decorations.
  • yeetstars0 - Minimalist prompt with git status decorations.
  • yindevstars2 - Variant of gndx. Includes decorations for git status and current directory.
  • ykmam - Modified from ysstars0 theme and optimized for a dark background.
  • ys (cristiancavalli)stars0 - Clean, simple, compatible and meaningful theme meant for dark backgrounds.
  • ys (tinyRatP)stars0 - Variant of ys.
  • ysmstars1 - Simple ZSH theme with git status information.
  • yukistars6 - A dark optimized ZSH theme.
  • yyl-ysstars25 - Includes conda and venv status.
  • yz50stars0 - Colorful, based off of robbyrussell and crunch themes. Includes git status decorations.
  • z4rr3tstars1 - Based on sindresorhus' purestars11.7k theme.
  • zcraftstars0 - Minimalist theme with decorations for git status, last command exit status and the time taken by the last command.
  • zeldastars2 Zelda-inspired theme. Includes git status decorations.
  • zemm-blinksstars7 - Customized version of oh-my-zsh blinks with mercurial support and other changes.
  • zemojistars4 - Based on wild-cherry. Includes exit status, virtualenv, nvm, rvm and git status decorations.
  • zerostars15 - Zero's theme & plugin. Has variants for both light and dark terminal backgrounds.
  • zeroastrostars4 - Works best on dark backgrounds, includes git status decorations.
  • zerocakestars0 - Works better on dark brackgrounds.
  • zeststars0 - A functional theme for ZSH. Influenced by zsh2000stars78, agnoster and powerlinestars1.1k themes.
  • zinc - A blazing-fast, pure ZSH, mixed asynchronous powerline prompt that's easily extensible and extremely configurable.
  • zlambdastars1 - Minimalist, includes git decorations without special font requirements.
  • zodiacstars0 - Includes an emoji for the animal corresponding to the current year.
  • zpromptsstars5 - Themes (prompts) that use original zsh theming subsystem.
  • zqtstars2 - Modified version of oh-my-zsh's maran theme.
  • zsh1999stars4 - Includes network connectivity, battery and git status decorations.
  • zsh2000stars78 - Powerline looking ZSH theme which includes the rvm prompt, git status and branch, current time, user, hostname, pwd, exit status, whether running as root and background job status.
  • zsh313stars0 - Minimal theme with git status decorations.
  • zshcomradestars7 - A ZSH theme, comrade!
  • zshpowerstars8 - Optimized for python developers. Includes git and pyenv status decorations, username and host. Tries to install other plugins and fonts, so read its instructions before installing.
  • zshredstars1 - Shows current directory, git decorations, exit status of last command and time.
  • zwshstars0 - A Zpm3/Wordstar mode/theme for ZSH.
  • zysstars10 - Similar to Agnosterstars3.6k, designed to disclose information contextually, with a powerline aesthetic.
  • zzshellstars0 - Inspired by the default Oh-My-Zsh theme. Displays exit code and git status decorations. Doesn't require Powerline fonts.

    • Frameworks

  • rossmacarthur/zsh-plugin-manager-benchmarkstars43
  • pm-perf-teststars3 - Tooling for running performance tests on multiple ZSH frameworks.

    • Fonts

  • Awesome Terminal Fontsstars2.3k - A family of fonts that includes some nice monospaced Icons.
  • Fantasque Awesome Fontstars31 - A nice monospaced font, patched with Font-Awesome, Octoicons and Powerline-Glyphs.
  • Fantasque-sansstars6.2k - Another Powerline-compatible font.
  • Hack - Another Powerline-compatible font designed specifically for source code.
  • Input Mono - A family of fonts designed specifically for code. It offers both monospaced and proportional fonts and includes powerline glyphs.
  • Iosevkastars14.7k - Coders’ typeface, built from code. Highly customizable.
  • Monoid - Monoid is customizable and optimized for coding with bitmap-like sharpness at 15px line-height even on low res displays.
  • Nerd Fontsstars38.8k - Collection of over 20 patched fonts (over 2,000 variations) & FontForge font patcher python script for Powerline, Font Awesome, Octicons, Devicons, and Vim Devicons. Includes: Droid Sans, Meslo, Source Code, AnonymousPro, Hack, ProFont, Inconsolata, and many more.
  • Powerline patched font collectionstars24k - A collection of a dozen or so fonts patched to include powerline gylphs.
  • Terminus - TTF version of Terminus that includes powerline glyphs.

    • Other Resources

    ZSH Tools

  • ShellSpecstars763 - A full-featured BDD unit testing framework for dash, bash, ksh, ZSH and all POSIX shells.
  • zsh-benchstars262 - A benchmark for interactive ZSH. It measures user-visible latency of interactive zsh: input lag, command lag, etc
  • zshdbstars249 - A ZSH debugger.
  • zshelldocstars5 - Doxygen for shell scripts. Parses ZSH and Bash scripts, outputs Asciidoc document with function lists, call trees, lists of exported variables, and more.
  • zunitstars173 - A powerful unit testing framework for ZSH.

    • Other Resources

    Other Useful Lists

  • awesome-devenvstars2.4k - A curated list of awesome tools, resources and workflow tips making an awesome development environment
  • awesome-sysadminstars15.3k - A curated list of awesome open source sysadmin resources
  • Terminals Are Sexystars10.8k - A curated list for CLI lovers.

    • Completions

  • _url-httplinkstars4 - Extends ZSH's _urls completion, allowing it to complete urls from html pages.
  • aliyunstars0 - Add completions for the Aliyun CLIstars675.
  • antibody-completionstars0 - This plugin provides completion for Antibodystars1.7k plugin manager.
  • appspecstars6 - Generating completions for Bash and ZSH from YAML specs
  • autopkg-zsh-completionstars9 - Completions for autopkg.
  • aws-completionsstars4 - Adds completion support for awscli to manage AWS profiles/regions and display them in the prompt.
  • bash-completions-fallbackstars35 - Support bash completions for commands when no native ZSH one is available.
  • batectstars1 - Adds tab completions for batect build system.
  • berkshelf-completionsstars16 - Adds tab completion for berkshelf.
  • better-npm-completionstars410 - Better tab completion for npm.
  • buidlerstars3 - Adds completion and useful aliases for NomicLabs Buidler tool buidler.dev.
  • bwstars1 - Adds completion for Bitwarden.
  • carapace-binstars91 - Multi-shell multi-command argument completer.
  • carthagestars1 - Provides completions and aliases for use with Carthagestars14.7k.
  • cf-zsh-autocompletestars33 - Adds autocomplete for all Cloud Foundry CLI commands.
  • codstars427 - A completion demon for bash/fish/zsh which creates completion functions on the fly when it sees you run something with --help.
  • codeceptionstars12 - Adds command completion for the Codeception Testing Framework.
  • comoniconstars0 - Tab completions for comoniconstars179.
  • cpanstars2 - Adds cpan install word<tab> and cpanm install <tab> to complete remote CPAN package names.
  • ctop - Tab completions for ctopstars13.5k.
  • daggerstars0 - Completions for dagger.
  • dbicstars0 - Automatically sets up Environment variables for DBIx::Class::Migration's script and Dancer.
  • docker (chr-fritz)stars5 - Loads docker ZSH tab completions directly from Docker for Mac.
  • docker (felixr)stars254 - Add tab completions for docker.
  • docker (greymd)stars43 - Add tab completions for docker and docker-compose.
  • docker-enter-completionstars9 - Command completion for docker-enterstars2.6k.
  • dotnetstars2 - Dotnet tab completion.
  • dropboxstars21 - A dropbox plugin for Zsh that provides dropbox-cli and dropbox-uploader commands.
  • drush_zsh_completionstars39 - Drush autocomplete awesomeness for ZSH.
  • duellstars2 - A ZSH plugin for duellstars40.
  • efibootmgrstars3 - Tab completions for efibootmgr.
  • etcdctlstars3 - Adds etcdctl tab completions.
  • expressvpnstars0 - Adds tab completions for the expressVPN client.
  • extract (le0me55i)stars11 - Defines a function called extract that extracts the archive file you pass it, and supports a wide variety of archive filetypes.
  • extract (thetic)stars6 - Fork of the oh-my-zsh extract plugin.
  • fzf-gcloudstars18 - Fuzzy completion to navigate and preview all Google Cloud SDK gcloud CLI commands
  • fzf-tab-completionstars323 - Add tab completion for ZSH, bash & applications using GNU Readline.
  • fzf-zsh-completionsstars95 - Fuzzy completions for fzfstars47.5k and ZSH that can be triggered by a trigger sequence that defaults to **.
  • gcloudstars77 - Add completions for the Google Cloud SDK.
  • git-annexstars15 - Allows tab completion for most git-annex commands.
  • git-flowstars2.8k - ZSH completion support for git-flowstars26k.
  • git-fzfstars12 - ZSH plugin that wraps git operations for simplicity and productivity. It also contains completions and combines support for fzfstars47.5k.
  • github-clistars4 - Tab completions for the github cli.
  • gitlab-runnerstars0 - ZSH completions for gitlab-ci-multi-runner.
  • gradle-completion (gradle)stars895 - Bash and ZSH completion support for gradle.
  • gradle-completion (ninrod)stars1 - ZSH completion support for gradle.
  • grid5000stars2 - Grid 5000 plugin - adds theme, autocompletions.
  • gulp (akoenig)stars32 - Autocompletion for your gulp.js tasks in the Z-Shell (ZSH).
  • gulp (srijanshetty)stars10 - Autocompletion for gulp.
  • hashlinkstars0 - Completions for https://hashlink.haxe.org/.
  • haskellstars18 - Adds completions for cabal, ghc and ghc-pkgs commands.
  • haxelibstars1 - Completions for haxelib.
  • helmfilestars2 - Adds autocompletion for helm.
  • ipfsstars9 - Completions for the Interplanetary File System.
  • joestars0 - Adds completions for joestars2.8k gitignore editor.
  • jtool-completionstars0 - ZSH completions for jtool.
  • jumpstorm-completionstars1 - Adds autocompletion for jumpstormstars43
  • jxstars0 - Adds tab completions for the Jenkins-X cli.
  • kafkastars47 - Completions for Apache kafka.
  • keybasestars18 - Completions for keybase.
  • kittystars2 - Completions for kitty terminal emulator.
  • kompose - Add tab completions for Kompose.
  • kubeadm - Add tab completions for kubeadm.
  • lazycompletestars6 - Lazy loading for shell completion scripts.
  • ls-gostars0 - Adds some useful aliases for ls-gostars174.
  • mooseX-Appstars0 - completion generator for Perl module MooseX::App.
  • more-completionsstars27 - 10500 zsh compsys completions!
  • msfvenomstars43 - Tab completions for Metasploit.
  • mx-honeystars8 - Provides completions for mxstars154; a command-line tool used for the development of Graal projects. It's meant to improve the usual workflow build unittest benchmark ... ease discovery and provide handy aliases.
  • newmanstars0 - Provides autocompletion for the Newman CLIstars6.1k.
  • nixstars142 - Completions for nix, NixOS, and NixOps.
  • node-acestars5 - Completions for node ace.
  • novastars7 - Provides auto-complete for nova.
  • npm-runstars52 - Autocompletion support for npm run.
  • nxstars79 - Completions for nx. Requires jq.
  • oktastars1 - Provides command line completions for the aws-okta and okta-awsclistars242 commands.
  • opstars6 - Tab completions for 1Password's op command line tool.
  • packerstars5 - Adds tab completion for packer.
  • pandoc-completionstars13 - Pandoc completion plugin.
  • parallelsstars9 - Add completions for Parallels desktop.
  • pass-zsh-completionstars8 - convenience repo to easily obtain pass command completion for ZSH.
  • pip-completionstars18 - Autocompletion plugin for pip.
  • pipenv (AlexGascon)stars1 - Enables aliases for the most common pipenv commands.
  • pipenv (gangleri)stars13 - Completions for pipenv.
  • pks-autocompletestars5 - Adds completions for Pivotal's PKS CLI
  • pmystars120 - General purpose context-aware ZSH completion engine powered by fzfstars47.5k.
  • quickjumpstars1 - Adds tab completion support for skimstars3.5k for recent files and directories using fasdstars29.
  • racket completionstars5 - Completion for Racket.
  • rake-completionstars9 - Add fast tab completion for rakefile targets.
  • rhoasstars2 - Adds completions for rhoas.
  • rustupstars11 - Tab completions for Rustup.
  • s3cmdstars0 - Adds tab completions for s3cmd.
  • salesforce-clistars87 - ZSH command completion for the Salesforce CLI. Requires jq.
  • saml2awsstars2 - Adds completions for saml2awsstars1.7k.
  • spring-boot-pluginstars10 - Adds autocompletions for spring-boot commands.
  • ssh-agent (bobsoppe)stars19 - Manage ssh-agent.
  • ssh-agent (hkupty)stars10 - Automatically starts ssh-agent to set up and load whichever credentials you want for ssh connections.
  • surfstars2 - Add completions for surf.
  • tmux pane words - Key bindings to complete words from your tmux pane.
  • tugboatstars4 - Adds autocompletion for tugboatstars1.5k command.
  • umakestars1 - Tab completion for Ubuntu umake.
  • vert.xstars0 - Provides autocomplete features for the vertx command.
  • web-open - Adds alias to open web pages. Only works with Ubuntu 20.
  • yabaistars11 - Add completions for macOS yabaistars13.1k tiling window manager.
  • yarnstars551 - Add autocompletions for yarn add, yarn remove, yarn upgrade, yarn why and yarn run.
  • zargparsestars9 - Pass it a script that uses argparse and it will write a ZSH completion to your current directory.

    • Plugins

  • 1999stars4 - Powerline-esque theme. Includes git status decorations, network and battery status.
  • 256colorstars123 - Enhances the terminal environment with 256 colors. It looks at the chosen TERM environment variable and sees if there is respective ncurses' terminfo with 256 colors available. The result is a multicolor terminal, if available.
  • abbr (olets)stars306 - Manages auto-expanding abbreviations that expand inline when you hit space, inspired by fish shell.
  • abbr-pathstars10 - Adds functionality of the theme_title_use_abbreviated_path parameter from some oh-my-fish themes.
  • abbrev-aliasstars101 - Provides functionality similar to vim's abbreviation expansion.
  • accurevstars1 - ZSH plugin for accurev.
  • actionastars1 - Make it easier to call actionastars343 scripts from your command line. Includes tab completions.
  • alacrittystars8 - Control alacritty color schemes.
  • alias-tipsstars652 - An oh-my-zsh plugin to help remembering those aliases you defined once.
  • aliasstars4 - Tool for managing your aliases.
  • allergenstars2 - A collection of custom ZSH plugins to use with Antigen.
  • almostontopstars84 - Clears previous command output every time before new command executed in shell. Inspired by the alwaysontopstars185 plugin for bash.
  • alt-and-selectstars3 - Binds the alt-c (copy), alt-v (paste), alt-x (cut) keyboard shortcut to a commands: copy-region-as-kill, yank, kill-region. Remaps the execute command to Alt-Shift-X.
  • ansiblestars13 - A plugin for Ansible.
  • ansiweatherstars1.7k - Weather in your terminal, with ANSI colors and Unicode symbols.
  • antigen-git-rebasestars6 - Antigen/ZSH script to aid with git rebasing.
  • anyframestars186 - A peco/percol/fzf wrapper plugin for ZSH.
  • apache2stars6 - Adds aliases and functions for managing Apache2.
  • apparixstars18 - Command line directory bookmarks with jumping to bookmarks, subdirectory tab completion, distant listing etc.
  • apple-touchbarstars317 - Adds MacBook Pro touchbar support in iTerm 2.
  • appupstars15 - Adds start, stop, up and down commands when it detects a docker-compose.yml or Vagrantfile in the current directory (e.g. your application). Just run up and get coding!
  • arcstars5 - Adds aliases for Yandex version control system.
  • arduinostars3 - Adds scripts to build, upload and monitor arduino sketches from a command line. Requires jq.
  • artisanstars481 - Laravel artisan plugin for ZSH to help you to run artisan from anywhere in the project tree, with tab completion!
  • asciidoctorstars4 - A plugin for AsciiDoctor.
  • asdf-direnvstars4 - Integration and completions for asdfstars15.7k and direnvstars362.
  • asdf-promptstars3 - Provides a function usable in prompts that displays version information for your current tool versions.
  • asdfstars13 - Integration and completions for asdfstars15.7k, the extendable version manager, with support for Ruby, Node.js, Elixir, Erlang and more.
  • assume-rolestars4 - ZSH plugin to allow you to assume AWS IAM roles easily. Includes completions.
  • asyncstars641 - Library for running asynchronous tasks in ZSH without requiring any external tools. Allows you to run multiple asynchronous jobs, enforce unique jobs (multiple instances of the same job will not run), flush all currently running jobs and create multiple workers (each with their own jobs).
  • atom-pluginstars4 - Based on the Sublimestars3 plugin, lets you launch a file or folder in Atom from iTerm 2.
  • atuinstars3.9k - Replaces your existing shell history with a SQLite database, and records additional context for your commands. Additionally, it provides optional and fully encrypted synchronisation of your history between machines, via an Atuin server.
  • aur-installstars2 - Small plugin to install packages from the AUR.
  • auto-color-lsstars45 - Automatically list directories with colorls.
  • auto-fu.zshstars422 - Automatic complete-word and list-choices. Originally incr-0.2.zsh by y.fujii .
  • auto-ls (commanda-panda)stars3 - Automatically runs ls or color-ls if available on cd.
  • auto-ls (desyncr)stars79 - Automatically ls when cding to a new directory.
  • auto-notifystars250 - Automatically sends out a notification when a long running task has completed.
  • auto-nvmstars0 - Automatically switches to the node version specified in a given directory.
  • autocompletestars2.5k - Automatically lists completions as you type and provides intuitive keybindings for selecting and inserting them.
  • autodotenvstars9 - Will prompt you to load variables when you cd into a directory containing a .env file.
  • autoenv-extendedstars156 - Extended version of the zsh-autoenvstars597 plugin.
  • autoenvstars597 - If a directory contains a .env file, it will automatically be executed when you cd into it.
  • autojumpstars14.3k - A cd command that learns - easily navigate directories from the command line. Install autojump-zsh for best results.
  • autopairstars353 - A ZSH plugin for auto-closing, deleting and skipping over matching delimiters. Only tested on ZSH 5.0.2 or later.
  • autoquoterstars85 - A zle widget ("zsh plugin") that will automatically put quotes around arguments to certain commands.
  • autosuggestionsstars23.7k - Fish-like fast/unobtrusive autosuggestions for ZSH.
  • autoupdate-antibodystars0 - A fork of autoupdate-antigenstars26 for the Antibody plugin manager, with the added ability to cooperate with static loading.
  • aws-mfastars2 - Plugin for AWS MFA.
  • aws-uploadstars0 - Boost your productivity with aws-upload.
  • aws-vaultstars65 - Plugin for aws-vaultstars6.9k. Includes tab completions.
  • aws2stars2 - Provides completion support for version 2 of the awscli and a few utilities to manage AWS profiles and display them in the prompt.
  • awsumestars1 - Plugin that enables showing the current awsumestars358 profile.
  • azure-subscriptionstars1 - Displays information about the Azure current Subscription and tenant.
  • backgroundstars3 - ZSH plugin which executes functions in the background.
  • baseballfunfactsstars2 - Print random baseball related "fun facts" in your shell. Depends on fortune and cowsay being installed.
  • basexstars2 - Adds several BaseX aliases for simplified usage.
  • bash-quotestars6 - Get random quote from Bash.im.
  • bashstars33 - Makes ZSH more Bash compatible. It redefines the source command to act more like bash does. It also enables bash completions.
  • battery_statestars7 - Show battery state in right-prompt.
  • bdstars376 - Jump back to a specific directory, without doing cd ../../...
  • bitbucket-git-helpersstars17 - Adds helper scripts to allow you to create bitbucket PRs or open a directory in the current branch.
  • blackboxstars6.3k - Stack Exchange's toolkit for storing keys/credentials securely in a git repository.
  • bofhstars2 - Adds functions to display random bofh fortunes.
  • bolstars5 - Prints a random quote when you open a terminal window.
  • boss-gitstars7 - Adds some convenience aliases for git.
  • branch-managerstars15 - A plugin for managing git branches.
  • brew (rhuang2014)stars0 - Standalone plugin for the Homebrew Package Manager.
  • brew (wolffaxn)stars0 - Standalone plugin for the Homebrew Package Manager.
  • browse-commitstars15 - A plugin that lets you open any commit in your browser from the command line.
  • brusestars0 - Makes it easy to brew link different versions of packages.
  • cstars1 - Adds some git shortcuts.
  • calcstars121 - A calculator for ZSH.
  • calibre-zaw-sourcestars3 - Calibre - E-book management source for zawstars527
  • caniusestars19 - Add Can I Use... support to ZSH.
  • careful_rmstars23 - A wrapper for rm that adds trash/recycling and useful warnings.
  • casestars3 - A ZSH plugin that adds two aliases tolower and toupper to switch output case.
  • cd-gitrootstars66 - A ZSH plugin to cd to the git repository root directory.
  • cd-lsstars6 - Automatically ls after cd.
  • cd-reminderstars12 - Display reminders when cd-ing into specified directories.
  • cd-reporootstars2 - A ZSH plugin to cd to the current repository checkout's root directory.
  • cd-sshstars0 - ssh to a server when you accidentally cd to it.
  • cdbkstars13 - A ZSH plugin to allow easy named directory creation - shortcuts to any directory you want.
  • cdcstars19 - Makes it easier to change directories to directories that are subdirs of a user-defined list of directories. Includes tab-completion, session history and pushd, popd and dirs equivalents.
  • change-casestars6 - Plugin for fast swap between upper and lower case in your command line. 😎
  • cheatsheetstars6 - Plugin to easily view, create, and edit cheatsheets.
  • check-depsstars1 - Helper for ZSH plugins that allows them to show how to install any missing dependencies. Works on Debian (and derivatives like Ubuntu), Arch and its derivatives, Nodejs and ZSH plugins if you are using the zpmstars251 framework.
  • clean-projectstars9 - Remove files from projects (automatically by default). Useful for keeping .DS_Store and Thumbs.db files from cluttering your directories.
  • clipboardstars31 - Adds a cross-platform helper function to access the system clipboard. Works on macOS, X11 (and Wayland) and Cygwin.
  • cmd-statusstars1 - Reports the status of commands including return code and duration.
  • cmdtimestars6 - Displays the duration of a command to the terminal forked from the timer plugin.
  • code-reviewstars2 - Launches git difftool on git merge-base target_branch base_branch and target_branch.
  • code-stats - Counts keypresses and logs stats to Code::Stats.
  • codexstars870 - Enables you to use OpenAI's powerful Codex AI in the command line.
  • colored-man-pages-modstars10 - Forked from ohmyzsh/ohmyzsh/plugins/colored-man-pages. Colorizes man output.
  • colored-man-pagesstars43 - Colorize man pages.
  • colorizestars12 - Colorize the output of various programs.
  • colorlsstars4 - Defines a few helpful shortcuts to some colorls functions.
  • colors (Tarrasch)stars40 - Makes it easier to colorize text from the CLI. red foo just works.
  • colors (zpm-zsh)stars33 - Enhanced colors for ZSH.
  • command-execution-timerstars5 - Displays the time an interactive shell command takes to execute.
  • command-notestars9 - Record complex commands and comment on them.
  • command-timestars159 - Show execution time for long commands in ZSH and powerlevel9kstars13.4k. Similar to REPORTTIME builtin, but only outputs when user + system time >= REPORTTIME.
  • compestars22 - Add completion for nvim-compestars1.3k.
  • completion-generatorstars216 - This plugin tries to read the list of options from the help text of programs and generate a completion function automatically. Note that this doesn't do it automatically, you have to explicitly call the generator to create a completion script.
  • condastars5 - Adds function to provide a prompt segment for conda and aliases for some base functions.
  • copy-pastastars18 - Copy and paste files in your terminal like you would in a GUI.
  • copyzshellstars68 - A ZSH plugin to copy your shell configuration to another machine over ssh.
  • crashstars52 - Adds proper error handling, exceptions and try/catch for ZSH.
  • crayon-syntaxstars0 - ZSH syntax highlighting for the Crayon Plugin for Wordpress.
  • cros-auto-notifystars0 - Automatically sends out a notification when a long running task has completed. Works with macOS and linux (if hterm-notify is installed).
  • crypto-pricesstars10 - Add a powerlevel9kstars13.4k segment with the current bitcoin price.
  • crystalstars28 - A plugin for Crystalstars17.9k.
  • czhttpdstars53 - A simple http server written in 99.9% pure ZSH.
  • deepxstars5 - Collection of useful and fun commands to improve workflow and quality of life.
  • deerstars289 - A file navigator for ZSH heavily inspired by ranger.
  • deferstars191 - Defers execution of a zsh command until zsh has nothing else to do and is waiting for user input. Its intended purpose is staged zsh startup. It works similarly to Turbo mode in zinitstars1.4k.
  • devstars4 - Provides a lightweight version of Shopify's internal dev tool
  • diractionsstars30 - Allow you to map a short logical/mnemonic name to directories to quickly access them, or perform actions in them.
  • dircolors-solarized (joel-porquet)stars104 - Solarized dircolors plugin, with options for dark or light terminal backgrounds.
  • dircolors-solarized (pinelibg)stars2 - Enables Solarized Color Theme for GNU lsstars2.7k.
  • dircyclestars17 - Cycle through the directory stack.
  • directory-historystars143 - A per directory history for ZSH which implements forward/backward navigation as well as substring search in a directory sensitive manner.
  • direnvstars7 - A plugin for installing and loading direnvstars9.6k. Inspired by zsh-pyenvstars37.
  • dirrcstars22 - Executes .dirc when present in a directory you cd into.
  • doas (anatolykopyl)stars5 - Easily prefix your current or previous commands with doas by pressing ESC twice.
  • doas (senderman)stars1 - Easily prefix your current or previous commands with doas by pressing ESC twice.
  • docker-machinestars2 - A docker-machine plugin for ZSH.
  • docker-runstars43 - Go back to running your commands "naturally", we'll handle the container.
  • dogeshstars6 - Dogification plugin.
  • dotbarestars525 - Interactive dotfile management with the help of fzfstars47.5k.
  • dotfilesstars19 - Keep your dotfiles in sync across multiple machines using git.
  • dotpyvenvstars6 - Automagically switch to a python virtual environment located (that you previously have created with virtualenv program) in a directory named .pyvenv when you cd into a directory.
  • drupalstars0 - Adds aliases for common tasks and also tab-completion for drush. Inspired by Artisanstars481.
  • dune-quotesstars4 - Random Dune quote generator plugin.
  • durationstars1 - Displays command duration if it exceeds a user-settable run time.
  • dwimstars81 - Attempts to predict what you will want to do next. It provides a key binding (control-u) that will replace the current (or previous) command line with the command you will want to run next.
  • easy-motionstars28 - A port of vim-easymotionstars6.8k for ZSH.
  • ec2sshstars10 - List EC2 instances and ssh login to the instances easily.
  • editing-workbenchstars1 - Adds sane, complex command line editing (e.g. incremental history word completion).
  • edward clistars0 - Adds smart completions and alises for edward CLI micro-service launcherstars160.
  • elixirstars145 - Adds shortcuts for Elixir, IEX, Mix, Kiex and Phoenix.
  • emacs (cowboyd)stars0 - Make Emacs the default for CLI operations like editing git commit messages; set up handy aliases.
  • emoji-clistars399 - 😱 Emoji completion on the command line.
  • emoji-fzfstars6 - Configurable ZSH plugin for the excellent emoji-fzfstars33. It is heavily inspired by emoji-clistars399.
  • enhancdstars2.2k - A simple tool that provides an enhanced cd command by memorizing all directories visited by a user and use it for the pathname resolution.
  • envrcstars1 - Automatically loads and unloads environment variables if a .envrc file is found in a directory.
  • escape-backtickstars1 - Quickly insert escaped backticks when double-tapping "`".
  • evalcachestars114 - Cache the output of a binary initialization command, to help lower shell startup time.
  • exa (DarrinTisdale)stars86 - Enables a number of aliases extending exa, the modern replacement for ls.
  • exa (hermitmaster)stars1 - Adds some aliases for exa, the modern replacement for ls.
  • exa (mohamedelashri)stars6 - Adds aliases for exa, a modern replacement for ls.
  • exa (ptavares)stars8 - Installs and loads exastars19.5k.
  • exa (ritchies)stars3 - Adds aliases to make using exastars19.5k easier.
  • exa-lsstars2 - Adds aliases so that you can use exa as a drop-in replacement for ls and tree.
  • exercismstars9 - A plugin for exercism.io.
  • expand-ealiasstars14 - Expand specific aliases with space.
  • expandstars13 - Expands regular aliases, global aliases, incorrect spellings and phrases, globs, history expansion and $parameters with the spacebar key.
  • expanderstars2 - A zle widget that allows you to write custom expanders and select them with fzfstars47.5k.
  • explain-shellstars22 - Opens commands on explainshell.com.
  • fast-alias-tipsstars52 - Helps remember the aliases you defined and forgot about. Ported from djui/alias-tipsstars652.
  • fast-syntax-highlightingstars477 - Optimized and improved zsh-users/zsh-syntax-highlighting – better response times, switchable highlight themes.
  • favstars3 - ZSH/fzfstars47.5k plugin that makes it really easy to add and recall named favorites of your important directories.
  • favorite-directoriesstars7 - Fast jumps to your favorite directories.
  • figuresstars6 - Unicode symbols for ZSH.
  • firebase (Seqi)stars9 - Display the current working project or project alias when in a Firebase project directory or subdirectory.
  • firebase (rmrs)stars5 - Add an indicator in the prompt that you're in a directory with a firebase.json file (aka "firebase project").
  • fixnumpad-osx - Enables numpad keys of Apple keyboards to be recognized in ZSH.
  • flow-pluginstars44 - This plugin makes the flow command available inside every subdirectory of the TYPO3 Flow distribution.
  • fnmstars11 - Installs and loads the Fast Node Manager (fnm)stars9k if it is missing.
  • forgitstars3.5k - Utility tool for git which takes advantage of fuzzy finder fzfstars47.5k.
  • functionalstars130 - ZSH higher order functions.
  • fuzzy-search-and-editstars33 - ZSH plugin for fuzzy searching files and instantly opening a matched file on matched line.
  • fzstars431 - Seamlessly adds fuzzy search to zstars14.7k's tab completion and lets you easily jump around among directories in your history.
  • fzf (unixorn) - Enables fzfstars47.5k history and file searches.
  • fzf-finderstars17 - Plugin to have a cool search keybinding with fzfstars47.5k and (optionally) batstars37.6k and fdstars24.9k. Falls back to find and cat. Searches in the local tree of subdirectories for files.
  • fzf-history-searchstars75 - Replaces Ctrl+R with an fzfstars47.5k-driven history search that includes date/times.
  • fzf-marksstars417 - Little script to create, navigate and delete bookmarks in bash and zsh, using the fuzzy finder fzfstars47.5k.
  • fzf-passstars2 - Better handling of passwords using fzfstars47.5k and pass.
  • fzf-preztostars2 - Prezto plugin that finds where fzfstars47.5k has been installed and enables its auto-completion and key-bindings. This plugin works as a Prezto zstyle configuration option.
  • fzf-tabstars1.7k - Replace ZSH's default completion selection menu with fzfstars47.5k.
  • fzf-utilsstars0 - Provides functions to kill proceses and find in path with fzfstars47.5k.
  • fzf-widgetsstars82 - Adds some ZLE widgets for fzfstars47.5k.
  • fzystars54 - Plugin that uses fzystars2.6k for certain fuzzy matching operations.
  • gcloud-projectstars8 - Easy selection of Google Cloud Projects.
  • gdbmstars0 - Adds GDBM as a plugin.
  • geeknotestars13 - Geeknote plugin for ZSH.
  • gentoostars0 - Adds some aliases and functions to work with Gentoo Linux.
  • geometry-datetimestars2 - Geometrystars849 datetime plugin. Shows datetime (date unix command) in your prompt.
  • geometry-hydratestars1 - Geometrystars849 plugin to remind you to hydrate.
  • geometry-npm-package-versionstars1 - Geometrystars849 plugin to display the current folder's npm package version.
  • geometry-rust-versionstars1 - Geometrystars849 plugin to display the current folder's Rust version when either a .rs or Cargo.toml is present.
  • ghost-zeusstars3 - Lets you use zeusstars3.3k with normal rails commands.
  • git-add-remotestars13 - Easily add the upstream remote to your git fork.
  • git-branchesstars3 - Makes a menu of git branches you can switch to without having to type long branch names.
  • git-complete-urlsstars1 - Enhance git completion to include in the remotes completion (e.g. from git clone) any URL in the clipboard.
  • git-extra-commandsstars809 - Extra git helper scripts packaged as a plugin.
  • git-flow-avhstars4 - Adds short aliases for the git-flow commands.
  • git-ignorestars25 - Generates .gitignore files from gitignore.io offline. fzfstars47.5k, completion, preview integrated.
  • git-it-onstars103 - Adds ability to open a folder in your current branch on GitHub.
  • git-pluginstars6 - Adds some functions for git.
  • git-prompt-useremailstars6 - Adds prompt reminders for git user.email.
  • git-scriptsstars1 - Adds git-squash-branch and git-remove-merged commands.
  • git-secretstars3k - A bash-tool to store your private data inside a git repository.
  • git-smart-commandsstars12 - Adds extra git commands to make some common git usages more efficient.
  • git-treestars2 - fzfstars47.5k powered git worktree helper.
  • gitcd (SukkaW)stars3 - Adds command to git clone a repository and cd into the resulting directory.
  • gitcd (viko16)stars10 - Automatically cd to a git working directory after cloning it.
  • githubstars1 - Fork of the original github plugin embedded in oh-my-zsh.
  • gitignorestars47 - Plugin for creating .gitignore files.
  • gitstatusstars3 - Makes it easy to show your git status in your prompt.
  • gitsyncstars4 - ZSH plugin to improve workflows for one person developing on the same repository on multiple machines.
  • goenv (bbenne10)stars5 - Manage $GOPATH similarly to Python's virtualenvwrapper.
  • going_placesstars1 - A plugin that helps to use, create and maintain a list of shell locations.
  • golinksstars0 - Launch golinks from your terminal.
  • gpg-agentstars12 - Plugin that tries to do the right thing when it comes to setting up the GPG agent to act as an SSH agent as well on macOS.
  • gpg-cryptstars8 - ZSH plugin to encrypt and decrypt files or directories in place.
  • grep2awkstars25 - ZLE widget to transform grep command into awk command.
  • grunt-pluginstars7 - Add autocompletion for grunt.
  • gshstars0 - Collection of helper functions for git
  • gtm-terminal-pluginstars15 - terminal plugin for git time metrics.
  • guishstars4 - Collection of utility functions and aliases.
  • gumsiblestars2 - Wrapper plugin for Molecule.
  • gunstagestars58 - There are at least eight ways to unstage files in a git repository. This is a command-line shell plugin for undoing git add.
  • gvm (yerinle)stars1 - Provides autocompletion for gvm (Groovy enVironment Manager).
  • habstars10 - Automatically loads OS environment variables defined in the file .envrc if it's found when changing to a new directory.
  • hanamistars7 - ZSH plugin for hanami projects.
  • hbtstars6 - Heuristic ZSH suggestion system based on past command usage.
  • hintsstars53 - Display glob and parameter flags and other non completable info right under your editing buffer.
  • hipchatstars13 - Send hipchat messages from the shell.
  • histstars92 - Edit your history in ZSH, without ever leaving the command line.
  • histdbstars1.1k - Stores your history in an SQLite database. Can be integrated with zsh-autosuggestionsstars23.7k.
  • history-enquirerstars62 - Enhances history search with more interaction and a multiline selection menu. Requires nodejs.
  • history-filterstars20 - Allows you to specify patterns that will automatically exclude commands from being inserted into your permanent history. Particularly useful for preventing secrets being written.
  • history-herestars9 - Binds ^G to quickly toggle the current shell history file location.
  • history-search-multi-wordstars42 - A syntax highlighted, multi-word history searcher for ZSH, bound to Ctrl-R, with advanced functions (e.g. bump of history entry to top of history).
  • history-substring-searchstars1.9k - Needs to be loaded after zsh-syntax-highlighting, or they'll both break. You'll also need to bind keys to its functions, details are in the README.md.
  • historystars82 - Extend history so that it can be queried by SQL.
  • hitokotostars12 - Displays a random quote from hitokoto.cn.
  • homeassistant-clistars2 - Provides completion and (configuration) helpers for the Home Assistant Command-line interface (hass-cli)stars318. and allows command line interaction with Home Assistant instances.
  • homebrewstars2 - Plugin for homebrew that supplements the one built into oh-my-zsh and can safely run with it enabled.
  • hooksstars41 - Add missing hooks - for plugins and personal use.
  • host-switchstars5 - Make it easier to switch in different /etc/hosts files during development.
  • hub-ci-zsh-pluginstars0 - A simple plugin for adding hub ci-status to your ZSH theme.
  • hubstars8 - ZSH plugin for forking model.
  • igitstars12 - Interactive git commands using fzfstars47.5k.
  • ingstars3 - Streamlined ping output.
  • instant-replstars2 - Activate a REPL for any command in your current ZSH session.
  • interactive-cdstars267 - Fish-like interactive tab completion for cd.
  • iosctlstars4 - Quickly access App, Data, and Log of the running simulator.
  • ipipstars13 - Plugin for IPIP.
  • iterm-tab-colorstars36 - Adds function to set the tab color in iTerm2 and can automatically change color based on cwd or command being executed.
  • iterm-tab-colorsstars46 - Automatically changes iTerm 2 tab color based on the current working directory.
  • iterm-touchbarstars679 - Display iTerm2 feedback in the MacbookPro TouchBar (Current directory, git branch & status).
  • iterm2-colorsstars4 - Manage your iTerm 2's color scheme from the command line.
  • iterm2-tabsstars5 - Set colors and titles of iTerm 2 tabs.
  • iterm2-utilitiesstars5 - Helps download various iTerm2 utilities and lets you omit cloning of the whole iterm2-website repository or relying on other repos which may be out of sync.
  • jabbastars5 - Adds shell integration code and completions for the jabbastars2.4k Java version manager.
  • java-zsh-pluginstars1 - Adds a setjdk command so you can switch easily between different versions of the jdk.
  • javaVersionsstars6 - Change between different java versions with a single command.
  • jdk-switchstars6 - A macOS-only plugin for switching between jdk versions.
  • jenkinsstars6 - A jenkins plugin for ZSH, heavily inspired by the excellent jira plugin.
  • jhipsterstars36 - Adds commands for jHipster.
  • jira-plusstars7 - Create JIRA tickets from the command line.
  • jvmstars4 - Allows selection of JDK on macOS.
  • k3dstars3 - Adds aliases and tab completions for k3d.
  • kstars1.7k - Directory listings for ZSH with git status decorations.
  • kctlstars3 - Add helper aliases for kubectl.
  • kill-nodestars7 - ZSH plugin for murdering node process families.
  • konsole-theme-changerstars2 - Toggle konsole theme from ZSH.
  • kube-aliasesstars70 - Adds functions and aliases to make working with kubectl more pleasant.
  • kube-ps1stars2.9k - ZSH plugin for kubectl that adds current context and namespace.
  • kubecolor (devopstales)stars2 - Adds aliases for the kubecolor command.
  • kubecolor (droctothorpe)stars7 - Simplify and colorize the output of kubectl get events -w
  • kubectx (ptavares)stars0 - Installs and loads kubectxstars13.9k.
  • kubectx (unixorn)stars7 - Automatically installs kubectxstars13.9k and kubens.
  • kubernetesstars70 - Add kubernetes helper functions and aliases.
  • lando (joshuabedford)stars8 - A collection of alias functions to enable the use of the CLIs within Lando without having to type lando to access them.
  • lando (mannuel)stars0 - Adds aliases for various Lando commands.
  • laradock-workspacestars1 - Provides an interface to Laradock's workspace.
  • laravel-sailstars20 - Adds shortcuts for sail commands.
  • laravelxstars1 - Adds some aliases for common Laravel commands.
  • lazyloadstars62 - Lazy load commands and speed up start up time of ZSH.
  • learnstars2 - Learning collection in MySQL/MariadB to save, query and quiz everything you learn.
  • liferaystars2 - Adds scripts for liferaystars1.9k development.
  • linkfilestars1 - Add shortcuts to your favorite directories.
  • linus-rantsstars15 - Outputs a random Linus Torvalds rant when opening a terminal.
  • listboxstars44 - Listbox element for shell.
